Friend – I’ll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. **With less than 20 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.**

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

**I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.**

[**So please, friend, will you split $3 between me and Maggie Hassan – or as much as you can spare today – to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54842819/379822119/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2089-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTdkMjc0OS02NjY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RtlfUOHCdUgGc83P9rJbEerq869Jodh2G8h05lNEq7I=)

Friend, the results from the general election showed me narrowly leading my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker.
But with the runoff officially underway and the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate grassroots support. **That's why I'm urgently asking:** [Will you give $5 or more before midnight to win in Georgia and keep this Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54842856/379822704/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5124-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTdkMjc0OS02NjY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l4Rp5FNkEjI1YnkfI8K1BL7tM34D7ObIM7JWP7Ir5Do=)
Election experts just confirmed what we've known for months: Our race will be decided by a razor-thin margin. That's why GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC is launching attack ads during this critical stretch.
**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. ****We've set a $50,000 midnight fundraising goal so we can fight back against GOP attacks and keep up our momentum – but we're falling dangerously short, and I need your help.**

body:
With less than 17 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch. | |
---
**$10** \-- that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, Derek. Your $10 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and defend our Senate majority nationwide. And your support has never been more urgent. Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 17 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch. **I mean it when I say your $10 donation could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. clean_body: With less than 17 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch. | | $10 \-- that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, Derek. Your $10 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and defend our Senate majority nationwide. And your support has never been more urgent. Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 17 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch. I mean it when I say your $10 donation could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, Derek: Will you split $10 now between my campaign and the DNC to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia and elect Democrats nationwide? Thank you for pitching in, Derek. I truly appreciate your support. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. body:

| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So, this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919089:6rGXGmGNL:m:1:3346849603:78167CF6180EC53458B246350EF40CA6:r "Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative
supporter!")**_

subject: let's make history (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |

This can't wait, friend: **We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election _._
**We need to fight back ASAP,__ or else we could put this seat in serious danger._ _ But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, friend:
**[Will you rush $5 or more right now so we can close our gap, power our runoff campaign to victory, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54843367/379850179/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5120-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZiY2MwZC03NzY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1SuWwkmmeIi-74VejR6es96ddEQVgv2B0QJc7-imus=)**

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: coffee and Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me.
| | | I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me.

It's the morning after the Georgia Senate runoff. You rub the sleep out of your eyes. Brew some coffee. Look at the news to find out what happened in that race -- the one that was going to determine the final balance of power in the Senate. **[The one where you chipped in an extra $5 to help push our candidate over the finish line.](https://go.dscc.org/go/11034?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221119-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221119-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8763%2E9716520%2EaGPABu)**

And wouldn't you know, the headlines are fantastic. We did it! Sen. Warnock won! We expanded our Senate majority. Your coffee has never tasted so great.

**But there's another way it could happen.** Morning. Coffee. News. But in this scenario, you didn't pitch in that $5. You were feeling pretty good about our chances, after all. The headlines jump out at you: "Democrats lose in Georgia. Herschel Walker unseats Raphael Warnock." Your coffee has never tasted so bitter.

You still have time to choose between these two outcomes -- but not much. We're running out of time to invest the resources that will mobilize voters -- so don't wait for tomorrow. Don't even read the rest of this email. [**Click here to chip in $5 right now -- and to sweeten the deal, the next 100 gifts will be QUADRUPLED!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11034?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221119-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221119-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8763%2E9716520%2EaGPABu)

subject: Stop the Big Government Socialists
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

**The Senate runoff in Georgia on December 6th will impact every single American.**

Inflation, recession, crime, unsecure borders, woke policies...and all the other lovely gifts from the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer cabal are only going to get worse unless we break the liberal chokehold on power.

Unless you want to see more one-party Democrat rule in Washington, **[I need you to stop what you are doing and make the largest possible donation you can directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61917981:6nkWvmGwN:m:1:3317145305:C0A2F0F0FB7D1219998C898887DA0841:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61917981:6nkWvmGwN:m:1:3317145305:C0A2F0F0FB7D1219998C898887DA0841:r)
We cannot allow Warnock to win. **Peter, that means we must help fund Herschel's runoff efforts against Warnock's multi-million-dollar war chest.**

| **RUNOFF DONOR FILE**
**SUPPORTER:** Peter Willis
**RUNOFF EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION:** [$34](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61917981:6nkWvmGwN:m:1:3317145305:C0A2F0F0FB7D1219998C898887DA0841:r)
**DEADLINE:** 11:59 PM TONIGHT

[** CONTRIBUTE NOW -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61917981:6nkWvmGwN:m:1:3317145305:C0A2F0F0FB7D1219998C898887DA0841:r)

---

We are at a crucial decision point. Either we help Herschel win...or we will watch the woke mob torch our nation's history.

Senator Warnock represents the failed values and policies of Big Government Socialism. Herschel wants to restore America with common sense values and policies that work.

That leads me to the heart of this email.

_Who would you like to see in the Senate from Georgia, Peter?_

Do you want to continue down the destructive path of Big Government Socialism with Warnock - or get back to an America that works for all Americans with Herschel?

**[Please go here to make an emergency donation directly to Herschel's campaign.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61917981:6nkWvmGwN:m:1:3317145305:C0A2F0F0FB7D1219998C898887DA0841:r)**

Thank you,

Newt Gingrich

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61917981:6nkWvmGwN:m:1:3317145305:C0A2F0F0FB7D1219998C898887DA0841:r)

In just a few years, Ron DeSantis has transformed Florida from a purple swing state into a blood-red Republican stronghold. _Time and again, Ron DeSantis has stood up to the WOKE mob and Fauci's COVID regime. That's why liberty-loving Americans fled blue states in droves and moved to the Free State of Florida._ Last night, as supporters chanted, "DeSantis for President", Florida voters repaid him with a resounding victory and another four years in office. **The message is clear. Ron DeSantis is a transformative leader like Ronald Reagan. And he's the ONLY candidate who has what it takes to defeat Joe Biden and take back America.** We MUST organize immediately to **_DRAFT Ron DeSantis for President_** , we can't sit on our hands and let the Socialist Democrats hold the White House in 2024. name: Mike Pence
subject: People of faith have led us toward a more perfect union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919108:JRiXvmGNG:m:1:3346849603:AAAC0443CE158F16DEA1EF316ADF2C76:r)
---
_**Without faith, our nation would have never succeeded.**_

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919108:JRiXvmGNG:m:1:3346849603:AAAC0443CE158F16DEA1EF316ADF2C76:r)
---

I come bearing grave news: the believers whose values shaped our great nation are now under attack. People of faith across the country have been ridiculed and shunned by Democrats and Hollywood elites for defending the teachings of the Bible.

These attacks on freedom of religion must STOP in America. That's why I started Advancing American Freedom to stand up for the religious freedoms of every American of faith. _**[Please, join me today in making sure every American has the right to worship without fear of persecution.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919108:JRiXvmGNG:m:1:3346849603:AAAC0443CE158F16DEA1EF316ADF2C76:r "Please, join me today in making sure every American has the right to worship without fear of
persecution.")**_

---
| | [STAND UP FOR RELIGIOUS FREEDOM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919108:JRiXvmGNG:m:1:3346849603:AAAC0443CE158F16DEA1EF316ADF2C76:r)
---

Under the Trump-Pence administration, we defended religious freedom at home and abroad. We didn't let freedom of speech end at the front doors of our churches, synagogues, or houses of worship. We protected the faith of all Americans.

Advancing American Freedom will continue to defend our right to worship. Make a contribution today to stand with AAF and protect the faiths of all Americans. Your donation will go a long way in defending faith based policies that protect religous freedom in America.

Without the support of patriots like you, I am worried our religious freedoms will continue to be supressed.

---
| | [PROTECT RELIGIOUS FREEDOM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919108:JRiXvmGNG:m:1:3346849603:AAAC0443CE158F16DEA1EF316ADF2C76:r)
---

God Bless,
Mike Pence

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpppuc3f41cel8jrv81h4knou9o1f0jhvudkv7jg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgm4o34clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze1jj3akkia0v05fdp9dij9pg86ueleh3luh5lh8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgm4o34clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpqlgaaheq0ke9st2l41gn5i1ftsf19qio9ckfhg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgm4o34clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zpogai8eqjsm2hi7vm64d72ht22nl8935s9iue50).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zufl6avccip79r628jqveclrndgndjhv6pt4h5jg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3c3ie2oj0chim49fg)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0043%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qhJJrFotms6fOdojjASyLA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fwmRc9vwzO7q7FWpLeZXUw&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40367%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QDWjNzU%2bZGL%2fT%2bTNwqOSVA&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40368%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q5Lal5Ko8cgrY7vKDOUgDg&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V0QdDgNBTaJJAnaaJpbReg&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40360%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ljk8cDsyEREt8GikjFrQ4g&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40361%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8zk1NYYmLzNaxTbH5C2u%2fw&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40362%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C8LXPaJDPqUTAgemsKnE5g&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40363%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LLOTQI%2fJ84nXuQImobd3ug&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40364%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FFeeicqRuquQkScs4KQj%2fw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40375%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DCYhYuF0TOX3kQe8CZr0ew&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40376%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hskRE7yJpQGmpvQq1Z780A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40377%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kzIvIUJ8zctPPBx%2fmsIjwQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40378%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IgNiDy1E8qLLKA%2fTU2unDQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40379%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TXMJX%2bA%2bowqo%2bF0NEKdYfw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40370%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RNicu%2fYC11I07so%2bZH%2f9Zg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40371%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WSJLNnxlI6bET4zMVWB6vg&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

clean_body: This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter,

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918026:6yo2-mGsN:m:1:3331703221:18221A3251726409ECDEF6DF1EBB0466:r)**

name: Your America
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6457%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DRdQjzSb9YzarXgk6U%2bEhA&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83095%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z1RRJIiZOtr%2fnPhC37eFBw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83096%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UGhIp4S5%2fjD1%2bML0mw5t2Q&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6457%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DRdQjzSb9YzarXgk6U%2bEhA&sysid=1)_

name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk47o4lin4em6ss0ap630erc3bd2bhf5q36nqq5g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ucp60pjnc8pn2ohk63ibcd9n6hie0tpkm1h71p9lcdqn2dhk6ipm8s3nmmr30ppnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfcjgcppbeddhcur62phlc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or3c3ie2oj0chgm49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znpmu5k6vq29fmodefh16bpt5hqmi6ok7mf0up1g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgm4o34c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqcqoj0po7pargns8kri1mpsj2rnqg0rlno4o858_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgm4o34c5h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoc0q28eb9fjpurh50a09g7fibbmav1vai8t9s3g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgm4o34c5h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zatkrm4pudcqnhpv2a4bdd46ejdu5bllrtr8g7c8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgm4o34c5h2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvl0ioueajfm7tfvmiaha6hqcmr9io1orjtj4rl0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgm4o34c5h2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq64923ev0aaiongc2p6pluugjpi4llnmi5j1o88_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmaor6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0du0f21hdikdsa1kqhqrk784endov2pt1ue3qj0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmaor6cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcn5iqlalottsfjhkmj0e8khq1f65k826mhael38_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmaor6cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” – Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” – Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” – Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE–starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzI0LWEzZDhlY2MzNGZiODRhZjRiMDI3YWU2ZGJiMDgyMTcyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Amx0rKxZe_5BM6drGyFmpg) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z601ogbgbqgo95r52dcdg513ab8trocdngaqf0s0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmco72c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zahqce1k0roqjqophi2rb3r8o7vkanu1rtqfh668_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmco72c3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf5pa83kk7jrh45t683e2adftvddu8e1aganode0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmco72c3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Defense News
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjplo33vbek6952rcpsmakrd5s6qq36iif3eauo8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmeob6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpjcoro8ketm6m2l56qkd2sheq1jq888fveejba0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmeob6c9h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf19v8cff072c4nl8rgjbd135309nhvajrdsdr48_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmeob6c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc0pbpvuqcrdopj4epbt5nagfiisg4p3mcr6odkg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjgmeob6c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Not a repeat of 2020

body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

I know I've asked a lot of you. But the 2022 election isn't over yet. The election results are officially in.
| **_[Georgia Election Results:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918226:6apmKmGNR:m:1:3331703221:A2EC47E2CCA1452CC99823059358E7C2:r "Georgia Election Results:")_****Herschel Walker (R) - 48.5%****Raphael Warnock (D) - 49.4%****Chase Oliver (L) - 2.1%****-- \---------------------------****Runoff election has been triggered!**
---

I wish I had better news, but this fight isn't over - not by a long shot._To win in Georgia, you must earn more than 50% of the vote._

**_I 'M HEADED TO A RUNOFF ON DECEMBER 6TH TO DECIDE THE FINAL WINNER OF THIS RACE._**
**_ _**
[EMERGENCY DONATION FOR THE RUNOFF FUND](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918226:6apmKmGNR:m:1:3331703221:A2EC47E2CCA1452CC99823059358E7C2:r)
---

Getting here was a massive undertaking. We were outspent by Senator Warnock $38 million to $101 million. We had a MASSIVE financial disadvantage.

It wasn't easy, but we pushed back and **FORCED** Senator Warnock into a runoff.

_But now our cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are funneling_** _MILLIONS_** _into Raphael Warnock 's campaign account._

**_[The only way we can fight back and win this race is with your help. Can I count on you to rush a donation to the runoff fund and save Georgia?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918226:6apmKmGNR:m:1:3331703221:A2EC47E2CCA1452CC99823059358E7C2:r "The only way we
can fight back and win this race is with your help. Can I count on you to rush a donation to the runoff fund and save Georgia?")_**

**_[Will you rush a donation of $35 or more before midnight to get me the resources I need to supercharge my runoff campaign?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918226:6apmKmGNR:m:1:3331703221:A2EC47E2CCA1452CC99823059358E7C2:r "Will you rush a donation of $35 or

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Herschel Walker has issues, but his big problem is that he’s a weak candidate who can’t rely on Georgia’s popular GOP governor being on the ticket with him to bring voters to the polls. If we raise Raphael Warnock funds so he's not swamped by $52 million that Mitch McConnell has dumped into this race, we'll win hands down.
body:
A big problem for Herschel Walker
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b64f16d-f445-4242-949f-2f9dd44abdc3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[HERSCHEL WALKER HAS A SERIOUS PROBLEM](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7d2d9b0-ea62-46af-87b5-1e5a77996889/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_No, as sick as it is, we're not talking about the multiple womens' lives he's threatened--including holding a gun to his ex-wife's head and telling her he'd "blow her brains out." Nor are we referencing Walker's serial dishonesty, from denying he took two women to get abortions (he did, and still believes in a ban, no exceptions) to claiming he served in the miliary (nope), police (nope), FBI (nope) and graduated from the U. of Georgia in the top 1% (he didn't graduate). _** _These are only some of Walker's many lies. The scary thing is there are so many, it makes me wonder if he actually believes them--if he even understands reality._ _**The problem we refer to is Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp won't be on the ballot this time helping****to turn**** out voters who only voted for Walker when they thought it meant a**** **_ _**Senate majority. Kemp received an astonishing 210,000 more votes than Walker, betraying the weakness of Walker's candidacy.**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Re-elect Sen. Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T020c79b6-c459-42d4-9132-bdd42dc1f873/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

So can you join Blue Amp Action in rushing $5, $10 or $25 to Raphael Warnock right now for the three weeks left in this runoff?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc715b77f-f070-4a8a-9a81-92c3874dfd07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thanks for standing up yet again, Blue Amp Action community.**
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

**⬇️⬇️⬇️**

---
This is the inside story of the Trump administration from its second highest official--what I said to the president and how I was tested.

I share exclusively how the faith that I embraced as a young man guided each and every decision I made at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.

**I 'm giving you a look into every second of my experiences in public service, from the early lessons to the major accomplishments.**

I will forever remain grateful for the grace of God, the love and support of my family, and the blessings of liberty that are every American's birthright.
---

If you chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, I'll send you a signed copy.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

For Faith & Freedom,
Vice President Mike Pence

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77138%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2XaBWOnRQ1Vxa2Q835cHuw&sysid=1)**

Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So, this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: With a RUNOFF officially announced, we’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead to keep Georgia blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I just want to say _thank you_.
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: We've got an incredibly tough fight ahead.
**We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign coffers.
That's why I'm asking directly: **[Will you split $5 between me and Jacky Rosen right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54846339/379861025/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2254-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzUxMDVhMy1kYjY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWMitmjWK8-kni1LYvePasGZx7FrKRaLZpqHTwnJu9A=)**
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything it's got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. **
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise to fight back against the GOP's megadonors, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Jacky Rosen to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54846340/379861026/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2254-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzUxMDVhMy1kYjY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWMitmjWK8-kni1LYvePasGZx7FrKRaLZpqHTwnJu9A=)**
Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Being honest with you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can't handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919597:J3VnHmGNH:m:1:3350876382:93973F12CFBC5FD328978B14B4EC5120:r)
---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919597:J3VnHmGNH:m:1:3350876382:93973F12CFBC5FD328978B14B4EC5120:r "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_

body:
Sunday, November 20th Edition
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uJEVLn0A2sRFTIcxbvdj4DBJOXEdmZiovsm4nLragyCQv0aSkEEjos7tJEY8xBMWcVXi8C5cWqUUHeHToVj3QOcxO0qjHjLfhairDdME9w95-XYpR4ROjrDY-FKymcALUSb_-hUZKRRkQqKvWv26qw==&c=jmhFGJ5IqqBBVQiMXJi4nrCQ4P8n9PvOUiq83ULkawmCQMVKjda0Sg==&ch=nwIN2FHeiDJDgyvs68fBa8rOV_0n5D7KOHOAqsS1DhWWTenpUoJw-Q==)

# Weekly Newsletter
---
| November 20th, 2022 | Issue XLI
---
| |
---
| | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uJEVLn0A2sRFTIcxbvdj4DBJOXEdmZiovsm4nLragyCQv0aSkEEjom3PB98DDVL3gE2vSyfpTyw1MFG0afwAY4FLxPQNFvuv_MazL2RQMkVDIGZLxYCU_s5hN_VIq0Os1aMyetvQl1LbkzLbJKpVLlhfevW4jKv2hQtYIxw9wtNWg1FT3RF_pOTbhF0LQ2jA&c=jmhFGJ5IqqBBVQiMXJi4nrCQ4P8n9PvOUiq83ULkawmCQMVKjda0Sg==&ch=nwIN2FHeiDJDgyvs68fBa8rOV_0n5D7KOHOAqsS1DhWWTenpUoJw-Q==)
---
Veterans' organizations play an important role in our community. Unfortunately, posts are increasingly placed in the difficult position of having to charge veterans more to facilitate current programming, with many posts foregoing any expansion or renovations due to cost restraints. Under this recently passed legislation, the Niagara County Legislature will be permitted to waive certain fees associated with such projects to avoid adversely impacting veterans who have served our country.
"I will always stand up for and support fellow veterans. I am thrilled that my bill, supporting our veterans and veterans' organizations, has been signed into law," said Leader Ortt.
---
| [VIEW BILL](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uJEVLn0A2sRFTIcxbvdj4DBJOXEdmZiovsm4nLragyCQv0aSkEEjom3PB98DDVL3gE2vSyfpTyw1MFG0afwAY4FLxPQNFvuv_MazL2RQMkVDIGZLxYCU_s5hN_VIq0Os1aMyetvQl1LbkzLbJKpVLlhfevW4jKv2hQtYIxw9wtNWg1FT3RF_pOTbhF0LQ2jA&c=jmhFGJ5IqqBBVQiMXJi4nrCQ4P8n9PvOUiq83ULkawmCQMVKjda0Sg==&ch=nwIN2FHeiDJDgyvs68fBa8rOV_0n5D7KOHOAqsS1DhWWTenpUoJw-Q==)
---
---
|
---
| This weekend, Western New York was hit with more than 6 feet of snow in some areas. The National Weather Service reported snow was falling in parts of Niagara County at a rate of two to three inches per hour on Saturday afternoon.
If you live in Niagara County and need up to date storm updates, make sure to click the [link here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uJEVLn0A2sRFTIcxbvdj4DBJOXEdmZiovsm4nLragyCQv0aSkEEjooU1PPAHKRD3cZxFhiatBBsoTSDFx65HHCzowc693AM3TpSka2a1tZ3L0Z1nlpzMrJLTTvaa-4XeQncVlXkuKhT6TFSnyK2h1L1rmFmI84LMI2OJ0zEG8fK0pjB5_8fM1Q==&c=jmhFGJ5IqqBBVQiMXJi4nrCQ4P8n9PvOUiq83ULkawmCQMVKjda0Sg==&ch=nwIN2FHeiDJDgyvs68fBa8rOV_0n5D7KOHOAqsS1DhWWTenpUoJw-Q==)
During times like these we need to remember to thank the members of our Department of Public Works for working around the clock to keep our streets clear.
---
| | | Rob Ortt welcomes new Republican senators elected to to fight for a stronger, safer, more affordable New York
Thank you to everyone who contributed to get a slew of Republican representatives newly elected to office for the 2022-23 legislative seasons. This new make up is going to make us stronger than ever before. This conference will continue to be a voice for law-abiding citizens, a voice for affordability and lower taxes and a voice to bring balance back to state government. We will not stop listening to your concerns and fighting for your constitutional freedoms.
Newly Elected NYS Republican Senators:

* Dean Murray, SD-03
* Steve Rhoads, SD-05
* Jack Martins, SD-07
* Patricia Canzoneri-Fitzpatrick, SD-09
* Bill Weber, SD-38
* Rob Rolison, SD-39
* Jake Ashby, SD-43
* Mark Walczyk, SD-49

---
---

clean_body: Sunday, November 20th Edition | | | | == | Weekly Newsletter | November 20th, 2022 | Issue XLI | | | | | == Veterans' organizations play an important role in our community. Unfortunately, posts are increasingly placed in the difficult position of having to charge veterans more to facilitate current programming, with many posts foregoing any expansion or renovations due to cost restraints. Under this recently passed legislation, the Niagara County Legislature will be permitted to waive certain fees associated with such projects to avoid adversely impacting veterans who have served our country. "I will always stand up for and support fellow veterans. I am thrilled that my bill, supporting our veterans and veterans' organizations, has been signed into law," said Leader Ortt. | == | | This weekend, Western New York was hit with more than 6 feet of snow in some areas. The National Weather Service reported snow was falling in parts of Niagara County at a rate of two to three inches per hour on Saturday afternoon. If you live in Niagara County and need up to date storm updates, make sure to click the == During times like these we need to remember to thank the members of our Department of Public Works for working around the clock to keep our streets clear. | | | Rob Ortt welcomes new Republican senators elected to to fight for a stronger, safer, more affordable New York Thank you to everyone who contributed to get a slew of Republican representatives newly elected to office for the 2022-23 legislative seasons. This new make up is going to make us stronger than ever before. This conference will continue to be a voice for law-abiding citizens, a voice for affordability and lower taxes and a voice to bring balance back to state government. We will not stop listening to your concerns and fighting for your constitutional freedoms. Newly Elected NYS Republican Senators: Dean Murray, SD-03 Steve Rhoads, SD-05 Jack Martins, SD-07 Patricia Canzoneri-Fitzpatrick, SD-09 Bill Weber, SD-38 Rob Rolison, SD-39 Jake Ashby, SD-43 Mark Walczyk, SD-49 | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: | == == == | | | | == | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with

THIS WILL BE OUR CAMPAIGN.
ALL TOGETHER.**

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqa199he1l17v5ogaiegmnh2nibkrq3d4gjqe8k8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim4o72c1h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc2g5cn2qq2mep37bdp3jism1enlikoiaiadlaoo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim4o72c1h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z691fm086ocrh264ts6tt8242rnrlfh0in8a5228_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim4o72c1h2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn2ne2d2cfsec1hfjoem3v7u0an9ved7kov64390_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim4o72c1h2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjvnprg4p9u5jimd31oe3bk9jv2ka46lcd71agp8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim4o72c1h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
