If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.” That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this. You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th. We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL! name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6451%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=pMPcmWcMYMKpz5r9TG87dw&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83090%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qxXcSqxPf4W3OSsBTxmBQg&sysid=1)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -_Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you’re thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, “what about them is influential?!”

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren’t, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83091%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tmdPyatHaBVAoVjd653mHQ&sysid=1)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83092%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u2NXRQDXw7rNjotqikOCKw&sysid=1)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here’s how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83093%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2dEB1Sq24SryHGN%2fouXDMw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83094%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2fXYUsk6%2b9phMKOwNUuGFw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83005%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fLzCLuFcmL5ZjVCoPzzYdw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83006%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lSYI%2bEqkok4XXGB5syLBJA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83007%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=coGsRTRG%2biuig1HtpIPing&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83008%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B5GreA0Bq4NZjt2ihgb%2frQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83009%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CcUVTtv3yNGfunghfVUb7g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83000%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0M1%2bxfWiRpD%2bEOLXzmaxXQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83001%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=stQoKi5qt4oGRIFQFiHmBw&sysid=1)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83093%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2dEB1Sq24SryHGN%2fouXDMw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83094%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2fXYUsk6%2b9phMKOwNUuGFw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83005%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fLzCLuFcmL5ZjVCoPzzYdw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83006%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lSYI%2bEqkok4XXGB5syLBJA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83007%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=coGsRTRG%2biuig1HtpIPing&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83008%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B5GreA0Bq4NZjt2ihgb%2frQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83009%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CcUVTtv3yNGfunghfVUb7g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83000%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0M1%2bxfWiRpD%2bEOLXzmaxXQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83001%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=stQoKi5qt4oGRIFQFiHmBw&sysid=1)

People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?”

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_“If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6451%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=pMPcmWcMYMKpz5r9TG87dw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6451%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=pMPcmWcMYMKpz5r9TG87dw&sysid=1)

People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?” It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. “If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: John N. Kennedy
subject: I just had my mind BLOWN AWAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Wow!

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918407:JxJnDmGBN:m:1:3331421248:2022B64DF9A65E750C0F1D24996EEC2E:r)
---
Peter,

I was riding in the car earlier today, and BANG!

Reality set in, and I came to a huge realization.

Once the Left gets their ducks in a row, they will be back to their old tricks. The red wave didn't pan out how we expected it, and the left will go into overtime to advance their radical agenda. **[I'll keep fighting until I'm out of breath, and we're not out of this fight yet.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918407:JxJnDmGBN:m:1:3331421248:2022B64DF9A65E750C0F1D24996EEC2E:r)**
| [**HELP ME FIGHT BACK**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918408:JxJnDmGBN:m:1:3331421248:2022B64DF9A65E750C0F1D24996EEC2E:r)
---

I KNOW we did our best here in Louisiana. We had a **MASSIVE** victory, but unfortunately, we still have a lot of work to do to turn our country around. We don't have time to sit around and cry over spilt milk. We need to get back on our feet and start fighting like the future of the country depends on it. Because it does.

**[Much like how a radical woker can't live without a $20 soy milk latte, I can't live without your support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918407:JxJnDmGBN:m:1:3331421248:2022B64DF9A65E750C0F1D24996EEC2E:r)**

The days ahead will be long and arduous. I'm sure there will be many things said in Washington over the next few months that will make me wish I could bash my head against the wall. **[However, I'm 100% confident it will be worth it, we're in this together, and we're not going to stop fighting, EVER.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918407:JxJnDmGBN:m:1:3331421248:2022B64DF9A65E750C0F1D24996EEC2E:r)**

body:
|

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919512:63ikimGNR:m:1:3361486117:138D4EF8655A91D7F60EA31E5B68FED8:r)**

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Up for the challenge!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
I feel like I’ve seen it all over the past 4 years – a global pandemic, government shutdowns, an insurrection in the U.S. Capitol – but this razor-thin margin in the House will present a whole new set of unprecedented governing challenges. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54854311/379890418/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTIzNzRkMS1lNTY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ma2j-CCdiMi8dXMsu0t5nVgmdKZw7nWe4CdHxzV4Ku0=&emci=f7c8a5d8-c265-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=d52374d1-e568-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=15529135) | It cannot be said enough times: __**THANK YOU**__. It is because of this team that I am returning to Congress for a third term, and I am so excited to get to work. Unfortunately, I will be headed back to Washington under a divided Congress. Democrats held on to the Senate, but the House majority is currently held by the GOP. We will also see a historic change in our Democratic caucus – Speaker Nancy Pelosi is stepping down from her leadership post. It has been an incredible honor to serve with the first female Speaker of the House for these past four years, and I look forward to working with colleagues new and old to carry her legacy forward. I feel like I’ve seen it all over the past four years – _a global pandemic, government shutdowns, an insurrection in the U.S. Capitol_ – but this razor-thin margin in the House will present a whole new set of unprecedented governing challenges. __**I am up for the challenge!!**__ I am headed back to Washington to fight for YOU – and I am confident we can make progress for Connecticut families across the aisle. Because despite all the challenges, we have already accomplished so much. You turned OUT and chose hope, optimism, and action over cynicism and fear. And as a result, we engaged so many new people, brought so many of our friends and neighbors into the political process, uplifted everyone’s voices – _and defied expectations._ [**As I prepare to begin my third term, I want to hear directly from you about what is on your mind. What do you want this new Congress to prioritize? Let me know here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54854313/379890421/-977486433?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTIzNzRkMS1lNTY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ma2j-CCdiMi8dXMsu0t5nVgmdKZw7nWe4CdHxzV4Ku0=&emci=f7c8a5d8-c265-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=d52374d1-e568-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=15529135) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54854315/379890423/-977486433?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTIzNzRkMS1lNTY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ma2j-CCdiMi8dXMsu0t5nVgmdKZw7nWe4CdHxzV4Ku0=&emci=f7c8a5d8-c265-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=d52374d1-e568-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=15529135)

THANK YOU THANK YOU!
– Jahana

clean_body: I feel like I’ve seen it all over the past 4 years – a global pandemic, government shutdowns, an insurrection in the U.S. Capitol – but this razor-thin margin in the House will present a whole new set of unprecedented governing challenges. | | It cannot be said enough times: THANK YOU. It is because of this team that I am returning to Congress for a third term, and I am so excited to get to work. Unfortunately, I will be headed back to Washington under a divided Congress. Democrats held on to the Senate, but the House majority is currently held by the GOP. We will also see a historic change in our Democratic caucus – Speaker Nancy Pelosi is stepping down from her leadership post. It has been an incredible honor to serve with the first female Speaker of the House for these past four years, and I look forward to working with colleagues new and old to carry her legacy forward. I feel like I’ve seen it all over the past four years – a global pandemic, government shutdowns, an insurrection in the U.S. Capitol – but this razor-thin margin in the House will present a whole new set of unprecedented governing challenges. I am up for the challenge!! I am headed back to Washington to fight for YOU – and I am confident we can make progress for Connecticut families across the aisle. Because despite all the challenges, we have already accomplished so much. You turned OUT and chose hope, optimism, and action over cynicism and fear. And as a result, we engaged so many new people, brought so many of our friends and neighbors into the political process, uplifted everyone’s voices – and defied expectations. | THANK YOU THANK YOU! – Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. subject: Take the Official Gun Registration Survey

body:
Take the survey before it's too late | The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918406:69uBimGNw:m:1:3317145305:D6EC53EC7D0B7F8ECDE833DB4F14841E:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918406:69uBimGNw:m:1:3317145305:D6EC53EC7D0B7F8ECDE833DB4F14841E:r)

Peter,

_**The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.**

Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough._

Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. We rely on input from real firearm owners like YOU, Peter, which is why I am asking you to complete the **Official Gun Registration Survey** IMMEDIATELY.

**[Take the OFFICIAL GUN REGISTRATION SURVEY to tell the NRA how we can best protect your Second Amendment rights.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918406:69uBimGNw:m:1:3317145305:D6EC53EC7D0B7F8ECDE833DB4F14841E:r)**

Peter, filling out the **Official Gun Registration Survey** only takes a few minutes. **It 's the best way to help the NRA protect your gun rights and stop government overreach.**

Your personalized link to take the survey expires SOON. Our team is counting on you to answer the questions openly and honestly, Peter.

**[Use this personalized link to tell the NRA how we can best protect your right to keep and bear arms.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918406:69uBimGNw:m:1:3317145305:D6EC53EC7D0B7F8ECDE833DB4F14841E:r)**

Thank you,

Wayne LaPierre
CEO, National Rifle Association

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zstjt8be8ntlh92c1fqj5o5d4baooq8kvj8oqt28_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmssu9pot1ct3om8civjrbgl9164ljsdgvp9ng3o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8gv3s0vtlgcinfsaoclb158d3ao2jad1oresd7g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z457kadh9psg69qjgsf33r5csc041svsqtsvg3i0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvtiml078igqq5lt5rujl5l85d9r5nq1gntt8u30_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn9vca22ms1la7lstsagl7nog5guvk761ln85c6g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo1o3fdtmhoo0n0o6m8g8vlo0p02td5a1jlt7r9g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z52372sv8bvrvne43f9vgbm2t7j7u0becb98b65o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zshuauqco0j4p9ntu5snoilnkc6ei4jikevakp88_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5dqq91n270g8gvgd91pcfmj2loaqaj13qqu4v80_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb55lh8athj165iqef691v2mva7k7cqirgakl89o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb3n3ue63benpbvnanugap466tk5q3ipeqs5fdfg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1q32aqprosa2m4nhnou1d1nqbdglvdja156nmd8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zettobgt79rd976ddncq0ndb8fnddv4biir8k9f8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf4gtqu2j75i0cf6hvfqsqiv5srhmobhpvkhuid8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb2lcjhpu2lg6umer9sfhd3bmevhoq2d04k5knuo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ei3pi4dn31uda0q3r2ulnabdqa9jknh306s6mg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za3n22kmt4hp0funs15pa3u0omagktdvr6jol3dg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjim1oj2c3h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zp98atamt9aa59i6boagfaij1sqqf0ouu7nhgpg0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zisg9cnfeo6rfg21trclkn9kdtib1j0fefnett7o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3c3ieao72c9ge49fg)

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9392b790c21a4debb661269311317865&_e=H1EL19t42awCwaO7f6r7GpAyuBlcf0hZmjcrFB-vysZJwy39ZREk0NfZIXYALzDKHKDkJ6pigheT3AzACenOL00axziysQApfdu_OMdxof9i2pAFjy4uiS7ipONv9-2xZQxRPsj4ThR1YiFKW2yyhOXlM18o88h6bKP7Xj1SmX7Kvh8nHrAqLzweQZgZ8bou5ITq-LfEf3v9JxUvGE2E085IRFVe4eJRdFuuu0Akrn8Wt1b7paHv1WNX2gdWNwJLdlCz5yg_x_YlL5nNT4tcAITG048LVSOA3kS7w4TK4Jsnfd0wYkwQFUVnutd7t4So-h5p2GIlbUSCqBiGC_CdLbR4oiSR6SrTyWVsjAZvqMILxbdKARLrOhMJSlcYMUmek4oSllrwMZZpNGXkGRelmQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9392b790c21a4debb661269311317865&_e=H1EL19t42awCwaO7f6r7GpAyuBlcf0hZmjcrFB-vysZJwy39ZREk0NfZIXYALzDKHKDkJ6pigheT3AzACenOL00axziysQApfdu_OMdxof9i2pAFjy4uiS7ipONv9-2xZQxRPsj4ThR1YiFKW2yyhOXlM18o88h6bKP7Xj1SmX7Kvh8nHrAqLzweQZgZ8bou5ITq-LfEf3v9JxUvGE2E085IRFVe4eJRdFuuu0Akrn9XcoFvlkINbxlsbSY3jP6EYCDYimOnnALcUtlCKfpEJ3bgrNTeem5mHWmsIRXk2a7wbhGjEInTmcdMZdUyVf8Plv3Dw8B9N2Oqyyz4kaz8n8wu1OErT8e6GVJaAz6pjUsAm9GohCM5n7LaJb5Df42c422bgcPHK4bdu_yKSnU3nA%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9392b790c21a4debb661269311317865&_e=H1EL19t42awCwaO7f6r7GpAyuBlcf0hZmjcrFB-vysZJwy39ZREk0NfZIXYALzDKHKDkJ6pigheT3AzACenOL00axziysQApfdu_OMdxof9i2pAFjy4uiS7ipONv9-2xZQxRPsj4ThR1YiFKW2yyhOXlM18o88h6bKP7Xj1SmX7Kvh8nHrAqLzweQZgZ8bou5ITq-LfEf3v9JxUvGE2E085IRFVe4eJRdFuuu0Akrn8D_T0k0P3rlsjV83pj6oSJLlj25-jYG-ykDmrUMskGheyEEKwk26y9sRjag3dZwMAE43aJM_lvDUlw_IzaTA3r85MpvenfqoW2hVMSzyJ2hkI6YLB_iMBFTqmfHH39V_eG3ubl2Rd3-uix_AQHUNpzYUrsdZFwsLBZMe2K23rU-w%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake.)

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What 's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach 's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that 's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** "They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."
**
That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6db98e8659ac4497833151e8f98f19a2&_e=lLGQrfhUEekqOVG1XRnc7xR4xea2lLiWBvmO-bgid6fJ-_YTgKyNK2BcNyVN13cVm5PVtkkjFOtIGxy4D7SvqQMLB6VBA51uZU5ZfR9HjdnKlMrORfG2x1KcN6qtGqWdKjZHonWDlfE0fNBWxnSe2depnbp8xNacRe8SriAgGnQjcdKlzexU-xZO9LUHVYTeRdsdQLDK2OgA-XgEde4BQQY9VPJFFtrCDL0A8Cg8ahZV53mczcZj_O3pIGMydtu8K4A__vhKEemk8LsSA8kaQsR3Y722W-z0UiObOrMp61rlqTj-aXp4Sws3KwsGEJ9X4rAavbcKIF8KkzfHwESF0A%3D%3D)
I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake.) Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words. He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen. But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy. Zach has been held without bail this entire time. What 's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once. And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach 's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted! As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA! Patriot, that 's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email. If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too. You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger. Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife: "They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you." That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time. I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people. I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this. You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th. We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL! Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9vfdkg9qvc7h9ier47rpsh27rkbmla7fdkmf6j0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onle8p73chkceqb2sr0corj6db4cuo7epjh6gpn9d1hm9i32ob3mapjdc5mmmqm0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9n6kqefcjgcoq61cr0suobapbi46h22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o32chh2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zossud9ihaa1o45ndgjn0vdklbu9052dqtde7kjg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o32chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvfdolp6kcb0l432m3vmsi25s0b5b4v2r48grqeg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o32chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z75b7hia4kti2c60654e6m5h364nvehjhug3dkp8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o32chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4cs0qmhn79ruqfki0nhttrth54knnspujl7c3io_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o30c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrhteofpshdf4vdo07p63u4157tgmld3jodnt41o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o30c3h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbp5bpojqe1ptl9lkl1k08881hg1t3ma08bu1ud0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o30c3h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z82nkieh8terfkhd9gftdpbg7e6ml5ot42jhp4eo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o34cph2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zemve6vqhfnumhfr1jp26an78l6mq965egjmu7eg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o34cph2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9kllc18tmev6env877pmg1haspj1fcubu74l4ko_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o34cph2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqnp7sc0816lhsohtbhi1dh1lq5rmii8fb97om78_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhm0o34cph2bs)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23e114ffc87f423e958f7bb292cbbb51&_e=qCWr9UbMiGI4mmmjad_TgFF3WdAGY-wtOROHfifGWWbuZ5iJzhNdvoNultad_p_pjh8UYE5JBYOSgYDqXKrQzwRJE-I07H2d0JYkW7qd4DOYnAO8BowforxgdT75NwqYgKGZsnZzHIlGKAs1SCU6jBN08ch4oYOWpFukhA5-61EbbptuRxS-U4kMkfeZXrXQ9GJJLeABjZFZ5F4nrhE6ZV-Dd4l7vA_tqU3uG9BETyYbv73EyKhsSAusmMwY_OFdm4STlNcxvigOJ-j-KZ5EwgfyzkkDwj8J8lQBl2kuNU5kbV9TCDxDqppsFzCesDlIlAYNtTlGh6l6BhBGCNo0FT4cY1DRvp-Z4NlW9Qz2ZSBkb61MpKOlqzZ9gAaCVYKJ)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9c728c0262c494fa23834a58331fc40&_e=eU2qTDOYovOq3vH8F10lSasRAi9Xctnta_NU7CjoVRz5JlCyxpPI0L66ZbrdwmQNiELijuKmOx_fLsbtKQKPx0rJyrvIMHZ2GDQzyZ72oS0ADsGIbo2FbWi7qY4KDENmeDjrMuh683JISiauOk2A5dFTfrb0KmWNb3pIE60o2xvaMZ5Zwo9j-FzTX6lggvPLJwTwEMdMDlbavr9CXJoou_HdhyZqBsR6XCovpQncrSB1rY8EaM06DmTiCW8lG7V45LPMhcYmJSon6bRa08Gg3IeqsWS4d31OzwaWg1CFbsU%3D). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9c728c0262c494fa23834a58331fc40&_e=eU2qTDOYovOq3vH8F10lSasRAi9Xctnta_NU7CjoVRz5JlCyxpPI0L66ZbrdwmQNiELijuKmOx_fLsbtKQKPx0rJyrvIMHZ2GDQzyZ72oS0ADsGIbo2FbWi7qY4KDENmeDjrMuh683JISiauOk2A5UPDcmJGY9I7USCTrxFqp4VShindhbgixKupdtB-bJBWb6ZmA5BwWAp2Q4LWPl9a9Iggd4VJKgwLzNCzF0-7GxMTs7HgaQ84qCgqYFlHJFBYHS6lM_orLwteab2eH8E4AZ7jKODskvMapD7qFwtrHFE%3D) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9c728c0262c494fa23834a58331fc40&_e=eU2qTDOYovOq3vH8F10lSasRAi9Xctnta_NU7CjoVRz5JlCyxpPI0L66ZbrdwmQNiELijuKmOx_fLsbtKQKPx0rJyrvIMHZ2GDQzyZ72oS0ADsGIbo2FbWi7qY4KDENmeDjrMuh683JISiauOk2A5blzwaPr-f1sKdpcdfKFinOjN-8w1je6-t7PG-x4rlH9na5iNnFwEX5sNYGayWMY5a3fBTbTYIujz5qihNUqugwFS_nUzVBT0LSn4iTeaUfUwV2RL4U0dVcQYkL53qKVAGgpxb9kbM6b6rLN07KQBdA%3D) when you get yours today. subject: Early voting starts next Saturday: Raphael Warnock’s campaign needs your support to get their message out on television, on the radio, and online, as well as to keep contacting voters on the phone and at the door.
body:
Warnock knows how to win
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06b35a0c-dee4-4225-b674-24cef525a200/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_If there is anyone who knows how to win a race in Georgia, it is Senator Raphael Warnock. It may be hard to believe, but he's won 3 statewide elections in Georgia in just 2 years!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taed66c7f-ecd5-43fa-b2c4-12caab1e7183/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The special election in November of 2020, the runoff January 5th, 2021 and November 8th. Now we know if he has the resources, he'll do it again on December 6th, when he takes on Herschel Walker, whose latest speech debated whether vampires or werewolves would win in a fight (I wish I were kidding. I am not. I guess he cherished "The Twilight Saga")._**
---

name: American Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0044%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=cfb28qEHMBEW%2fbroKUvtcA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40303%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2QGuETUU5rO4NxF6bZUqKw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40304%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ypwmtiOa%2f%2fggZ59P2NjzUg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40315%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=buyJ3mvQol0tGmYbPoTNzA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0044%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=cfb28qEHMBEW%2fbroKUvtcA&sysid=1)_

name: Full Mag News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c001fc81c9f04971918ae4a11465a719&_e=v31juwP1aUsr1TvU2Q4RVmk6oaI-EIoJU6UA_G5nyfMIciEpml9kd_F17DqJ9tNBjk1L_DfkrihexD5Y7UoBJ0OaVYE_KUnbYTCxj_xAmZoiWnobrmcqPx5Kif03dg-GcqhbEW00Bu2Beo5cBxFaH1jiCwVB8EwKuAJDPWyb917lmAqsDAFTax4r-nFeBe2xxAmLnOadEsa4TO6Mpw_YpYNe8DCuoi3_LF1I9v-CPlWdUOoaaharHPzf_1AgKuo7J83O7TOmh1JTCLQpbxyvWyc3RN9NBk6phFryFI7vXc4gSiPsxsKe0w9sw92u0PQo-MUx9h6u5hxHtGuwzlKeaVzutqweM2JIWQsGx2LgO9NtlnKxAgz0rlII4lvVPRwJibsgrXZQgeUnf7e74PpChQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c001fc81c9f04971918ae4a11465a719&_e=v31juwP1aUsr1TvU2Q4RVmk6oaI-EIoJU6UA_G5nyfMIciEpml9kd_F17DqJ9tNBjk1L_DfkrihexD5Y7UoBJ0OaVYE_KUnbYTCxj_xAmZoiWnobrmcqPx5Kif03dg-GcqhbEW00Bu2Beo5cBxFaH1jiCwVB8EwKuAJDPWyb917lmAqsDAFTax4r-nFeBe2xxAmLnOadEsa4TO6Mpw_YpYNe8DCuoi3_LF1I9v-CPlWdUOoaaharHPzf_1AgKuo7iIa9-tBsjyXtUHtwuAWPJUk4KoI13Y9N92Ymov-UMziRaEbnIx_GGrBSikNh2BJEoFB-BxOtFg4GKuhyBDY6efyqIfjMyi9xD65zr7kTd31_wmt1h28KKpLFmsLLukmPTtxw8aFPcbI9KdGLXO2y-g%3D%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c001fc81c9f04971918ae4a11465a719&_e=v31juwP1aUsr1TvU2Q4RVmk6oaI-EIoJU6UA_G5nyfMIciEpml9kd_F17DqJ9tNBjk1L_DfkrihexD5Y7UoBJ0OaVYE_KUnbYTCxj_xAmZoiWnobrmcqPx5Kif03dg-GcqhbEW00Bu2Beo5cBxFaH1jiCwVB8EwKuAJDPWyb917lmAqsDAFTax4r-nFeBe2xxAmLnOadEsa4TO6Mpw_YpYNe8DCuoi3_LF1I9v-CPlWdUOoaaharHPzf_1AgKuo7c0LEkedsbEFGj-Bvfxzvk-1y4wgxrrtiF7SSqGoT7mi1BHWkjyJHgz0bbxDYiNrbofO5XjoL2xUelOFLFe5S3KQEnDBjqAU0eA4wtas8pZH8Sr5MEWaDxblH2t4uD5mYkooHZ0VUeu_YpwEyqoNrAA%3D%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race isn’t over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |
---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on election day, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on election day, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I just want to say thank you.
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one. With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: Will you split $25 between me and Serve America right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.
With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking: Will you split $25 or more right now between me and Serve America to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you for your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Get the truth about these 40 political myths
body:
There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z379bn3qq40chm5sek3167vsgntss8fjisd87qn0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu6gqvmrmpf38o9hhiudka8o29snrqfmme05cohg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze5ufkiv4ntb26j6lpk0g6t6ihiah907j4mqpm88_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

**[https://act.libertasutah.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi2e1tpvh57aj4jsk6sld6mm2uo5icuioqosma4o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)**

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of _**[The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcrpk8fpcncfut06d9m00qd44q7ag44meraon6q0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)**_ today!
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919683:J0We3mGbN:m:1:3370555685:F839AC2C8148813A36B89879C2B30DAE:r)**_

[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919684:J0We3mGbN:m:1:3370555685:F839AC2C8148813A36B89879C2B30DAE:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919683:J0We3mGbN:m:1:3370555685:F839AC2C8148813A36B89879C2B30DAE:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919683:J0We3mGbN:m:1:3370555685:F839AC2C8148813A36B89879C2B30DAE:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919683:J0We3mGbN:m:1:3370555685:F839AC2C8148813A36B89879C2B30DAE:r)**

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919554:6FkTJmGcN:m:1:3360412034:1A1A83FDAEBCE23C66D7E69E1B8FCF93:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919554:6FkTJmGcN:m:1:3360412034:1A1A83FDAEBCE23C66D7E69E1B8FCF93:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919554:6FkTJmGcN:m:1:3360412034:1A1A83FDAEBCE23C66D7E69E1B8FCF93:r)**

**Friend, with just hours to go before tonight's midnight fundraising deadline, we’re so close to hitting our goal. But we’re still falling short. In a race this tight, we can’t afford to fall behind.**
I've never backed down from a tough fight. You see, as a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my community, I became the first in my family to graduate from college, and then, the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church.
Now, I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure _every child_ can achieve their American dream, but I can't win this battle alone: **National Republicans are rushing this race with MILLIONS to defeat me this December.**
I don't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so the ONLY way I can keep my seat blue and win our critical fights for justice is with your grassroots support. **Please, friend, I need you now:**[Will you give $5 or more to help us hit our goal, defend this seat, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54845623/379857394/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5132-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQyNDI0MS1kMzY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTVsdwwhgcf4AW6sPyKzWaJyTrC6EFZ_Yu4J4c9Kgxc=)

name: American Briefing
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdk2omcmdke0tjgkid742gm08tjh2mlb52f5aof8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg2ki4t8cspgn0q91pc5ggr9tkeehka76psdtd20_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8eb8srvsjn4ill4dem5tc92q0t3gst5n8b53c40_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdf4jmg5ntu99ecrndguhait5t2v7m600vgt61d8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za5ekhhoo2ej1kcu4jcojjs20dsbko4k718njjm8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
