name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6cniubh9qhdm3klsdpjdmgpihpa5sragea76qa0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4en9d37m052pos593fjb95dlsdhv4g7f5a092ig_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr2qpu4hge5j24sdmukbkdmrls3kiaetkn0lc5pg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0v25pu8jifikjidbmnc1a9h62138ulo4lpq3ht8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z441v169o1varqkcer2a6g5har2fi0ubofju78t8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjhmeoj4cth2bs)

---

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84a879f8efaa444da891abb0703e915d&_e=hl2O90kkjVj2OyaY0esyU3_OTnmYr9uoLDPH4GAQq5rl2hVRK8v1fHwGFnxdH6cC0MNijLvuawyPYPhudjy83iqR1qUkN2djVusG7S4ViQG9fdVsWwjtXuXKp1Hw5S0eSjhwp29SObz2TinCa7HmPbMi6fo1GuVc0-J82vToeOORXRDhfCtDe1kO1BNtfXMZEY3Mf_uDRIBk8D6zlItVFyL9NsUwwmjXvN3j7TlSeB6ZzoeTP7JJJkgVU7d9kmGvMW-5DQlTkXwTQ_k7a3p7mvJ4FzNo3xkKrMDBzvT_6scVjZ9w3wa0wDowFgXv7oqRz5mt1J5MzKEmT91HzuPrEr6Ax7hrDE-ZHiIK2mTy3jSoJC_d2tTh8MV4DCJ4A1O9cr6jAi95_EKu-FmHtSxzet7A3ExMJfzA27xmfTpt-u4%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84a879f8efaa444da891abb0703e915d&_e=hl2O90kkjVj2OyaY0esyU3_OTnmYr9uoLDPH4GAQq5rl2hVRK8v1fHwGFnxdH6cC0MNijLvuawyPYPhudjy83iqR1qUkN2djVusG7S4ViQG9fdVsWwjtXuXKp1Hw5S0eSjhwp29SObz2TinCa7HmPbMi6fo1GuVc0-J82vToeOORXRDhfCtDe1kO1BNtfXMZEY3Mf_uDRIBk8D6zlItVFxrcyVQLxeufmpHT_8k6V8fGiPBoSsBblFvSUIbrS3NuQXu2_R5gZO339Qf2NTQ11AH4_i5rkLn1BIMbOO0XIJPePnKUUe6T4E6e27fBZC_FhAYfFpYsOGe8Kp8dcisCw8FOPeaWkb26BmdAvwoTPMTBweico-gXu0suusQtvs8bqgRLIchEorjmQHq9GAWiZMjO8szTI3-LZO1RqB4soIY%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |

body:
I’ve been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our heart in the game. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6458%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=CxWqOI%2bra1v7A0sDAcpxuA&sysid=1)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Fellow American, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Fellow American, to ensure we keep it close.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vn8YT%2bmOur%2fI8uPoT1aYFA&sysid=1)**

We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $7, we'd easily hit our goal.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LeiAuF5EK0tyDOreopbxqg&sysid=1)**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: I need your input to make plans
body:
| | |
---
I can’t thank you enough for everything you have done this year (and in past years) to save the United States from those who want to fundamentally transform and destroy our beloved country. **And, as a grassroots organization, your input matters more than anything else. We can’t chart the right course for 2023 without your feedback today.** After the 2020 election, the grassroots told us to focus primarily on election integrity, and that is what we did. The good news is there were many advances made this year on that front, but as we saw in the election that just passed, there is still so much to be done. That is why I need to hear from you – to know where you want us to focus as an organization and kind of work you think still needs to be done on election integrity in 2023, so that together, we can prepare for 2024. You can complete the survey by clicking this link:**[https://tpp.me/eisurvey](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-A)** Again, I am so deeply grateful for you and for the value your knowledge, wisdom, and ideas bring to our movement. I’m sure that without you, we would have already lost the fight. Thank you for sharing your thoughts and time. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin P.S. It would be helpful if you could submit your survey responses no later than Sunday, November 27th, so we can begin reviewing responses.
---
| | [COMPLETE MY SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._39gKk_pA)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---

clean_body: | | | I can’t thank you enough for everything you have done this year (and in past years) to save the United States from those who want to fundamentally transform and destroy our beloved country. And, as a grassroots organization, your input matters more than anything else. We can’t chart the right course for 2023 without your feedback today. After the 2020 election, the grassroots told us to focus primarily on election integrity, and that is what we did. The good news is there were many advances made this year on that front, but as we saw in the election that just passed, there is still so much to be done. That is why I need to hear from you – to know where you want us to focus as an organization and kind of work you think still needs to be done on election integrity in 2023, so that together, we can prepare for 2024. You can complete the survey by clicking this link: Again, I am so deeply grateful for you and for the value your knowledge, wisdom, and ideas bring to our movement. I’m sure that without you, we would have already lost the fight. Thank you for sharing your thoughts and time. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin P.S. It would be helpful if you could submit your survey responses no later than Sunday, November 27th, so we can begin reviewing responses. | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919734:6qbnamGNg:m:1:3368395361:49239280ECDDEEAF28EEC8A12855B109:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919735:6qbnamGNg:m:1:3368395361:49239280ECDDEEAF28EEC8A12855B109:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919734:6qbnamGNg:m:1:3368395361:49239280ECDDEEAF28EEC8A12855B109:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919734:6qbnamGNg:m:1:3368395361:49239280ECDDEEAF28EEC8A12855B109:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919734:6qbnamGNg:m:1:3368395361:49239280ECDDEEAF28EEC8A12855B109:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Warnock Campaign Team
subject: please read this ASAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
It’s official, Peter. **Georgia is headed to a runoff election, and we need all hands on deck to power Rev. Warnock to victory. Here are three key numbers you need to know:**
**16 days.**
That's how long we have before Dec. 6th’s runoff election to defend this seat.

**7 million.**
That's the number of registered voters across Georgia that we need to reach with our people-powered message.

**$20,000.**
That's how much more we’re aiming to raise before midnight to ramp up our voter mobilization efforts in this final stretch.
**[Rev. subject: I’ve got some BIG news!

body:
This is the inside story of the Trump administration from its second highest official—what I said to the president and how I w

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zggbntd7hcalek64jcdsk0flkvqk56ev96pa686g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjjm0o76c9h2bs)
---

Mike Pence here, did you hear the news?

_**[I have prayed over this day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people-the good, the bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved for you. Want to hear more?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvtnaqemmbraonve20f2q345v610uohamk3vau9g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sjjm0o76c9h2bs "I have prayed over this day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people–the good, the bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved for you. Want to hear more?")**_
**⬇️⬇️⬇️**

---
This is the inside story of the Trump administration from its second highest official--what I said to the president and how I was tested.

I share exclusively how the faith that I embraced as a young man guided each and every decision I made at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.

**I 'm giving you a look into every second of my experiences in public service, from the early lessons to the major accomplishments.**

I will forever remain grateful for the grace of God, the love and support of my family, and the blessings of liberty that are every American's birthright.
---

If you chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, I'll send you a signed copy.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

For Faith & Freedom,
Vice President Mike Pence

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2e006c1d458546d18dc64b04f510299f&_e=2ZBSjkj88aUBH0vkGvasDKhcdQU7kOkxmu3GJ6_Ty1rYTt4QLYh1XGvmVpMYwlSOdRx01RUebGinuWXnP0TlJ8AUDNS_5NAggg5x7u9LD_XN8faGVaiL0lheNEb2dPPgqqMk84B0e5qtBfhK5PSHCI_S24J5IHygWlvC15F8UKwHtm_B6NWrvW05Xej4fxUmTYaxDnKKZ9Yjl7RlHRcb5zriwKeuSbUSQltVY9dKA6c0-9q7ssgZlG5IQ0aPqF7P7gW9zt_9V-3RNvji3dQUnLGrGHgpPwC4Dti40md6hLP9j2U5Sfd9lGSsDIH88oHXGMNpKuFXtMRRmyXtAHBheRlB-zRFYl6RnpmmbAP9Rn81Cdg75kfHyYu8ciEp4BKPmQKb3TAm0w3nUDNQglEalg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2e006c1d458546d18dc64b04f510299f&_e=2ZBSjkj88aUBH0vkGvasDKhcdQU7kOkxmu3GJ6_Ty1rYTt4QLYh1XGvmVpMYwlSOdRx01RUebGinuWXnP0TlJ8AUDNS_5NAggg5x7u9LD_XN8faGVaiL0lheNEb2dPPgqqMk84B0e5qtBfhK5PSHCI_S24J5IHygWlvC15F8UKwHtm_B6NWrvW05Xej4fxUmTYaxDnKKZ9Yjl7RlHRcb5zriwKeuSbUSQltVY9dKA6c0-9q7ssgZlG5IQ0aPqF7PRYKgtlplIDrU4Nn-Mp0NvDhSX6VcMz2ytFE18k-gyNf_llLr_NV1n3iwvXfllu1rkX1uxZiCvcl5PnQnMujCfBgfpoVTnIu9CLp_NY10-SWU0zxN0FzZA2NxoY5YC_BYXBe6myof7dnBhZOdngOB2Q%3D%3D) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2e006c1d458546d18dc64b04f510299f&_e=2ZBSjkj88aUBH0vkGvasDKhcdQU7kOkxmu3GJ6_Ty1rYTt4QLYh1XGvmVpMYwlSOdRx01RUebGinuWXnP0TlJ8AUDNS_5NAggg5x7u9LD_XN8faGVaiL0lheNEb2dPPgqqMk84B0e5qtBfhK5PSHCI_S24J5IHygWlvC15F8UKwHtm_B6NWrvW05Xej4fxUmTYaxDnKKZ9Yjl7RlHRcb5zriwKeuSbUSQltVY9dKA6c0-9q7ssgZlG5IQ0aPqF7PMdXbsBVuWakIyvJO_fmDqMdiX1LsRD0uCAA5FtFTF10tW8epiAYv0kBHbMDeZtlpp8iKoEnM3uEWP_01vrjBhVvPGsYDHtQ5QSEdV3MIJmpBkUtphIaf0mTuVk80thlXIPm88y-IZsSpU2FCKvWTgw%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919364:Jf0HPmGXN:m:1:3331703221:AA2FC84063B4E3E14F333FB401349A4B:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919364:Jf0HPmGXN:m:1:3331703221:AA2FC84063B4E3E14F333FB401349A4B:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919364:Jf0HPmGXN:m:1:3331703221:AA2FC84063B4E3E14F333FB401349A4B:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919364:Jf0HPmGXN:m:1:3331703221:AA2FC84063B4E3E14F333FB401349A4B:r)**

Abortion access, the future of public education, the minimum wage, ballot access, prescription drug prices, LGBTQ rights, and much more – all of these things will depend on Democratic success in the 2023 elections. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** The future of Virginia is on the ballot in 2023. Next year’s election will determine whether or not Glenn Youngkin’s last two years in office will be rubber-stamped by a Republican legislature. = VADEMS =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship ser They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f7cad235f0e749738e2a937f2b8e2941&_e=04bOc4Sn3AVeoiBx0C0oJQvZRMed7KAH1kyXj3Wm-d8epsj8oqtELsehN47LBDVWSMN3LGGw_iaQZRTo0HOyDOX62hRAnHlwo8wYNX8l7dZL-PSPbKIB7_JMKbivV0vA8vQG3z2CyASzJu1lYFjIPFjNTli6_eJX9essf-niIlX885IXG_1MwQdOVUSDNmY-t1IKdA5Mkp1-_58E_vClBOcsI_OV1sOpWAEDMtlVAsQseTqHcmGdGzhRJDtVNL9EG0rNDMpjsaxn595OoGxWmq4CibZFFc-WbKnFRDFb74NNtMTUHY67xWqnbRyqWQfl)

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f7cad235f0e749738e2a937f2b8e2941&_e=04bOc4Sn3AVeoiBx0C0oJQvZRMed7KAH1kyXj3Wm-d8epsj8oqtELsehN47LBDVWSMN3LGGw_iaQZRTo0HOyDOX62hRAnHlwo8wYNX8l7dZL-PSPbKIB7_JMKbivV0vA8vQG3z2CyASzJu1lYFjIPFjNTli6_eJX9essf-niIlW9aYFBBKPYQ0lcsIDv5VloZOGb-f-YyG2VPit4tokHcOtseOq8fiTbzy25cuiSG_HLufOMF7ii8dfCxtJrTormJZbdZ6VI9qv7qk_KNYi9RASpEy7WxEEwReVR4jfJKJv82hrZ3IKMI-IXqgv25Kmd) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f7cad235f0e749738e2a937f2b8e2941&_e=04bOc4Sn3AVeoiBx0C0oJQvZRMed7KAH1kyXj3Wm-d8epsj8oqtELsehN47LBDVWSMN3LGGw_iaQZRTo0HOyDOX62hRAnHlwo8wYNX8l7dZL-PSPbKIB7_JMKbivV0vA8vQG3z2CyASzJu1lYFjIPFjNTli6_eJX9essf-niIlXrJ2yfXqdCi8T3ICrTeeNRqW248nUiVMnml1QuuhUu6TsdfmY7c7whVR1RycviEYC2ckgiu2IzTy4fD7K0JYltkeiAmxGHvZAIlArcZX7FNzXrFeICKf02RA9ACaI9q43jFGR9SL65VvrO3eFWwUnX)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):
* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f7cad235f0e749738e2a937f2b8e2941&_e=04bOc4Sn3AVeoiBx0C0oJQvZRMed7KAH1kyXj3Wm-d8epsj8oqtELsehN47LBDVWSMN3LGGw_iaQZRTo0HOyDOX62hRAnHlwo8wYNX8l7dZL-PSPbKIB7_JMKbivV0vA8vQG3z2CyASzJu1lYFjIPFjNTli6_eJX9essf-niIlU-KarY8wZ4MOGvpW6clMWuRVP5leiyEMb8KO2eD_IGy96ZHol4iTezXDuxcxkEWMwcDX7x77S93AgeN6fhfIuZl5K9Wz0AyEHmR4frr9MXy2uM_aVLifdNdnzq1FqDNPJpbydGqS3c1eD0qlzRvbA9)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f7cad235f0e749738e2a937f2b8e2941&_e=04bOc4Sn3AVeoiBx0C0oJQvZRMed7KAH1kyXj3Wm-d8epsj8oqtELsehN47LBDVWSMN3LGGw_iaQZRTo0HOyDOX62hRAnHlwo8wYNX8l7dZL-PSPbKIB7_JMKbivV0vA8vQG3z2CyASzJu1lYFjIPFjNTli6_eJX9essf-niIlW845TGwYqXyWVscWR2dHdpMxuYNw_NHGmiDg4ZX9yTDHFL9lf-vCg40Ieqeba47_edBZMaGoHC5WaUrl17MT4-Tzd2QxaSazgXPxZO0-TvhIRBHSDrH57I0Pe_1HMPSBmdggdxQFUtzNYlZJ2CndXe)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f7cad235f0e749738e2a937f2b8e2941&_e=04bOc4Sn3AVeoiBx0C0oJQvZRMed7KAH1kyXj3Wm-d8epsj8oqtELsehN47LBDVWSMN3LGGw_iaQZRTo0HOyDOX62hRAnHlwo8wYNX8l7dZL-PSPbKIB7_JMKbivV0vA8vQG3z2CyASzJu1lYFjIPFjNTli6_eJX9essf-niIlVl5KMELlpoh169YgdayT6W6sw3fnbxVYnMVX7zNY76WbjOtA4aKmvBxuy4t0spdgaLrmKXt7MMmSYzPtQVybA0s7_9B9l3tYEFwNyb33wiV3lnD-iSrnS8k1AvdHP8IpVN0D3frZ-A_A7sDAhOtjr_)
---

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cfb43c9829be4e62910dbc763c6b1d72&_e=HIj8gOq6q8NanG_J8y2bNIS3uV9quAV0ZNewNN1gqHNtZn2FCIYwJtGoZBIfl8vj3too7OHojTvCNvvYHOAwlUvXSbu0113VdQGSia-wcZhklk5-o6nOUKdetfUuxfyXEUk_3g3j6UrvOTft0dGTNKT8rXMZdjwPdKmoomh7cfWkXVLMMbazYAu8pWDYHrptV1aiSKCy30OlKjDMmQGH-mPeQZrsTThGW9OsNJgZHDAYJORm4fpCvP8UuzBUpx0_8m79AlVcI7e44SOpk6q7V31MNTbN0LAU0xVsg_WkGDLaWr-_XRpWSkCZ-u0QJiBD)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cfb43c9829be4e62910dbc763c6b1d72&_e=HIj8gOq6q8NanG_J8y2bNIS3uV9quAV0ZNewNN1gqHNtZn2FCIYwJtGoZBIfl8vj3too7OHojTvCNvvYHOAwlUvXSbu0113VdQGSia-wcZhklk5-o6nOUKdetfUuxfyXEUk_3g3j6UrvOTft0dGTNKT8rXMZdjwPdKmoomh7cfUm_7SpWNHFaBWnoyy_c8Arxz_781268KiKGGaK_-xaDQ7SVZzt9rRF5kkcleAdD0aWC0S_EBOoPtv2_zA5UEW_3AscE_LFV6paCHWAfhBcNp2FajO50UNea7NXvB5HJae8xHI1GAPPRwG8vlg3drBs)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cfb43c9829be4e62910dbc763c6b1d72&_e=HIj8gOq6q8NanG_J8y2bNIS3uV9quAV0ZNewNN1gqHNtZn2FCIYwJtGoZBIfl8vj3too7OHojTvCNvvYHOAwlUvXSbu0113VdQGSia-wcZhklk5-o6nOUKdetfUuxfyXEUk_3g3j6UrvOTft0dGTNKT8rXMZdjwPdKmoomh7cfX0gJkS9Z9HX03AUfAktBC_pKSER1pIRUZNY-xIa-yncYxnaLLB-8gbahvTGLFds2MIpsXXpNPQm8hU_4GTSbx4PSF7kVTHQBxpBnx0sxzq3tuX936epcqiKYzodi05nhZjqyDklBfDe51FAUCBHx6j)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cfb43c9829be4e62910dbc763c6b1d72&_e=HIj8gOq6q8NanG_J8y2bNIS3uV9quAV0ZNewNN1gqHNtZn2FCIYwJtGoZBIfl8vj3too7OHojTvCNvvYHOAwlUvXSbu0113VdQGSia-wcZhklk5-o6nOUKdetfUuxfyXEUk_3g3j6UrvOTft0dGTNKT8rXMZdjwPdKmoomh7cfWEZZPNeCKlOFqYqE49VLIkZca9QOhNt42BcQJ53ntQ18VxFSK70ccyyvCXAjwGj5PVuxbVQy_nRVH3K2GcPe68t1L-haJ7GtzoItacuIhmGoSIfnocnwkIu3e7qtj6QQSHvB1gJixik9mg8lm__KNr)

Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election. Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue. But right now, we’re falling about $11,381 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight. The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.

Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:** **[Please, will you chip in $10 or more right now to split between me and Voter Protection Project so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35228?t=6&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5)** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35228?t=7&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5) I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.

**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like _you_ with me to win – now more than ever.** **[So please, I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more between me and Voter Protection Project to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35228?t=8&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35229?t=9&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35230?t=10&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35231?t=11&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35232?t=12&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35233?t=13&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5)
Thank you,

Reverend Warnock
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=5420%2E878179%2EW-gno5)

Friend – remember those secretary of state races we told you about leading up to Election Day? This is what [**_your donations_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54856802/379899098/1887409474?&amount=30&refcode=20221120.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhOTg3ZjYyLWVjNjgtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zwhvLDgD8qSPmP2iM6ffu5pqT1vVY8C4kkuwVo4nEOI=) helped make happen: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54856803/379899099/1887409474?&amount=30&refcode=20221120.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhOTg3ZjYyLWVjNjgtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zwhvLDgD8qSPmP2iM6ffu5pqT1vVY8C4kkuwVo4nEOI=)
---
That’s right – NDRC-endorsed candidates for secretary of state defeated MAGA election deniers in Arizona, Nevada, and Michigan. And our endorsed gubernatorial candidates defeated election deniers in even more states!
Here’s what President Obama had to say:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54856804/379899100/1887409474?&amount=30&refcode=20221120.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhOTg3ZjYyLWVjNjgtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zwhvLDgD8qSPmP2iM6ffu5pqT1vVY8C4kkuwVo4nEOI=)
---
But while this is great news, keep in mind that **many election deniers WERE elected on November 8** – including Republican governors like Florida’s Ron DeSantis, U.S. Senate candidates like Wisconsin’s Ron Johnson and Ohio’s J.D. Vance, and dozens of U.S. House candidates.
So we have our work cut out for us. And you can help, just like you helped us score big wins on Election Day! [_Will you pitch in to support the NDRC’s ongoing efforts to defend democracy by securing free and fair elections?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54856805/379899101/1887409474?&amount=30&refcode=20221120.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhOTg3ZjYyLWVjNjgtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zwhvLDgD8qSPmP2iM6ffu5pqT1vVY8C4kkuwVo4nEOI=)
Look friend, our movement achieved something amazing on November 8. But we know, and you know, that this isn’t over.
The effort to protect our democratic institutions is – must be – bigger than just one election. And with Donald Trump’s recent announcement, MAGA election deniers will likely be super-charged for 2024.
**Your help today will give us the resources to start building an early bulwark against their attempts to dismantle our democracy.** [_Can you chip in – even if it’s just $5?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54856806/379899102/1887409474?&amount=30&amount=5&refcode=20221120.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhOTg3ZjYyLWVjNjgtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zwhvLDgD8qSPmP2iM6ffu5pqT1vVY8C4kkuwVo4nEOI=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Donald Trump is a con man, a charlatan and a twice-impeached disgraced former president. He grifted the government out of millions, turned the levers of government power against his enemies, and abused the power of his office over and over again.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1379%2E5257348%2EPVidL8)
Derek —
Donald Trump is a con man, a charlatan, and a twice-impeached disgraced former president. He grifted the government out of millions, turned the levers of government power against his enemies, and abused the power of his office over and over again.
And Trump just announced he’s running for the presidency yet again. Promoting new lies about the 2022 election as he did it.
**[We can’t let him win. We just can’t. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $10 right now so we can begin building the resources we need to Stop Trump.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em.lEaqBw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221120_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1379%2E5257348%2EPVidL8)**
Listen, I don’t think it’s hyperbole to say that our democracy will not survive another four years of Donald Trump in the Oval Office. At least it won’t look anything like the democracy we have now.
This is a deeply unethical and dishonest con man who demanded his underlings commit illegal acts, stonewalled all oversight by Congress, and sought to have the DOJ and IRS investigate his political enemies.
_That was all in his first term. I shudder to think about what would happen in a second._
Given the GOP failure in the midterms — of historic proportions — many in the Republican Party are starting to have doubts about the wisdom of clinging to this failed leader. They would not abandon him because he is dishonest (they are okay with that), or because he is immoral (no problem), or even because he is a danger to our country (they can live with that). They will only abandon him if they think he is a loser — and their continued subservience to him will make them losers.
Which means we must continue to make sure that Trump and his hand-picked candidates, like Herschel Walker, lose and lose big.
Until that happens, the GOP will continue to do whatever he wants. They will say whatever he says. And they will carry his water no matter how outrageous his demands. Even if that means overturning the next election. Especially if it means overturning the next election.
And with Republicans possibly taking control of the House in January, they will do whatever it takes to carry out his political vendettas. Going after Joe Biden and his children, beginning impeachment proceedings against cabinet members, stripping me of my committees, etc. It will be chaos.
That’s why this is all so urgent, and why we have to begin planning now. That’s why I’m so glad this grassroots team is on our side. Because we have what it takes to take on Trump’s MAGA movement and win. We just proved it, and we will need to do it again.
**[Can you chip in $10 to immediately counter Trump’s announcement? We must all do our part to stand up for our democracy and stand up to Donald Trump.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em.lEaqBw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221120_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1379%2E5257348%2EPVidL8)**

clean_body: | Donald Trump is a con man, a charlatan and a twice-impeached disgraced former president. He grifted the government out of millions, turned the levers of government power against his enemies, and abused the power of his office over and over again. Derek — Donald Trump is a con man, a charlatan, and a twice-impeached disgraced former president. He grifted the government out of millions, turned the levers of government power against his enemies, and abused the power of his office over and over again. And Trump just announced he’s running for the presidency yet again. Promoting new lies about the 2022 election as he did it. Listen, I don’t think it’s hyperbole to say that our democracy will not survive another four years of Donald Trump in the Oval Office. At least it won’t look anything like the democracy we have now. This is a deeply unethical and dishonest con man who demanded his underlings commit illegal acts, stonewalled all oversight by Congress, and sought to have the DOJ and IRS investigate his political enemies. That was all in his first term. I shudder to think about what would happen in a second. Given the GOP failure in the midterms — of historic proportions — many in the Republican Party are starting to have doubts about the wisdom of clinging to this failed leader. They would not abandon him because he is dishonest (they are okay with that), or because he is immoral (no problem), or even because he is a danger to our country (they can live with that). They will only abandon him if they think he is a loser — and their continued subservience to him will make them losers. Which means we must continue to make sure that Trump and his hand-picked candidates, like Herschel Walker, lose and lose big. Until that happens, the GOP will continue to do whatever he wants. They will say whatever he says. And they will carry his water no matter how outrageous his demands. Even if that means overturning the next election. Especially if it means overturning the next election. And with Republicans possibly taking control of the House in January, they will do whatever it takes to carry out his political vendettas. Going after Joe Biden and his children, beginning impeachment proceedings against cabinet members, stripping me of my committees, etc. It will be chaos. That’s why this is all so urgent, and why we have to begin planning now. That’s why I’m so glad this grassroots team is on our side. Because we have what it takes to take on Trump’s MAGA movement and win. We just proved it, and we will need to do it again. name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff78c75fcfc148d6b6d7ff023572a740&_e=LjzlvPG7kknbKPhvTtiNZzALf6vL5cPncZaiiSGt0zqvGv2roavEYQ9hirMoQ5V-8IyOruk50Jjm9nRpV38BdMDxsH-vJxJpxYvhUGNDJbm5P3Nl0uJh09H7nk5epsBz3bLzC6FXtuedNl8Eq_hWG_aBiSI5pf2PwGP88RiX_151vUxqMaSIJ_BnCAaf8odv9DfEcX3QYIp8F-QRAHk07EHboItMDtrvSdUoHpD7QQ5wIZwstiS8eQDfrNmXkI5Qk0po27MWW5N2QXvn7-R_NKkq-doECyTr1glU7DCIi9k%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff78c75fcfc148d6b6d7ff023572a740&_e=LjzlvPG7kknbKPhvTtiNZzALf6vL5cPncZaiiSGt0zqvGv2roavEYQ9hirMoQ5V-8IyOruk50Jjm9nRpV38BdMDxsH-vJxJpxYvhUGNDJbm5P3Nl0uJh09H7nk5epsBz3bLzC6FXtuedNl8Eq_hWGxQXzjiE150MVTd_1GlaDAoj-is56sOGpTmZ8b6qsTyXOw83yCjM4E0OJpvANOOsTWovGgzHksc5MF0RdKrSkGS6LX_HKrBJBMGRnSkOdNVjcQdk1qsP_Rr4btx2Ciw2rebTZbGj9MfHmyCMzSOiCdY%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff78c75fcfc148d6b6d7ff023572a740&_e=LjzlvPG7kknbKPhvTtiNZzALf6vL5cPncZaiiSGt0zqvGv2roavEYQ9hirMoQ5V-8IyOruk50Jjm9nRpV38BdMDxsH-vJxJpxYvhUGNDJbm5P3Nl0uJh09H7nk5epsBz3bLzC6FXtuedNl8Eq_hWG2MydVUAH44juxghT5HZ5FB97l-DFHNIQrarrs09PN2XcIXdcRdlSWzBZOxxqYZV6oVludQ79FtgkV02THraiOzvSbO4kPEzFhW9vcJMKQCAq-xpieNiKkUFgtiAzDFX8D5NTHl_Bd85PZHhjkVGjrM%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff78c75fcfc148d6b6d7ff023572a740&_e=LjzlvPG7kknbKPhvTtiNZzALf6vL5cPncZaiiSGt0zqvGv2roavEYQ9hirMoQ5V-8IyOruk50Jjm9nRpV38BdMDxsH-vJxJpxYvhUGNDJbm5P3Nl0uJh09H7nk5epsBzuYduuLxnVDoZM06z44WW1at7O5qFOE5tmRXnbcsFGgaI9xlL1NNkWbdQomdJQZXARavJ7jzyy61kZC4-OyhpQTwvt64IgXwPAXLFItxv3h8mPHDn8CGPZJ_XfYLpcunrS1GS22wdFmjqwTa7Dp6Pxf_Q3YxSSrziS7Wbzd2kAH0%3D)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Transgender Day of Remembrance:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Recommitting to the fight of defending the rights and liberties of EVERY American.
Peter,

My heart is with the people of Colorado Springs impacted by last night's devastating act of violence. Nobody should face the threat of harassment, assault, or death simply for living as the person they are.

But last night is a heartbreaking reminder that countless LGBTQ+ Americans - particularly Black transgender women - face hate, harassment, and violence every day.

I want to make one thing clear: **We should all be committed to equality and equity for the entire LGBTQ+ community.**

**Today is Transgender Day of Remembrance. It 's a day we remember, honor, and celebrate the transgender and gender non-conforming Americans who were taken from us as a result of hatred and intolerance.**

Every person has a right to exist, live, and be who they are. We cannot tolerate the hate and violence that is increasingly directed at our trans neighbors, loved ones, and friends. I will continue to fight back against any policy that treats any American like a second-class citizen.

**On this Transgender Day of Remembrance - and every day - I hope you'll join me in remembering and honoring the lives we have lost. Today is a chance to recommit to defending the rights and liberties of EVERY American. **

As always, it's an honor to represent you.

- Derek

name: Pete Maysmith, LCV Victory Fund
subject: Georgia: Important update on turnout in two key counties (read this today)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www
body:
Give today to support LCV Action Fund-endorsed candidates |
---

| Peter -- just wanted to make sure you saw our message below.

The race between Sen. Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker is going to come down to turnout -- and **there are serious gaps in our outreach capacity in Fulton and Cobb counties right now.** We need your help:

[See my note from earlier this week -- and then please, donate today. Your contribution will be triple matched -- even $5 is enough to make a difference.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

\- Pete |

* * *
|
---

| Peter -- you've seen the news -- the Georgia Senate race between Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker is headed to a run-off, now just a few weeks away.

[We need your help.](https://links.messages.lcv.) We already have a major field presence in Georgia, and our teams have identified serious gaps in our outreach capacity in Fulton and Cobb counties.

Meanwhile, we've _also_ identified more than 300,000 environmental voters in Georgia who supported President Biden in 2020, but are in jeopardy of **_not_** showing up in this run-off.

We have an outreach program that's ready to roll out. But how fast and how big we can go is **going to come down to resources.**

A group of donors have put up an emergency triple match fund to scale up environmental turnout efforts in Georgia. [Please, please, please: pitch in today. This WILL make a difference, I promise -- and even $5 is enough to help.](https://links.messages.lcv.)
|
---
**[**GET OUT THE VOTE IN GEORGIA:
TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_)**

We _cannot_ afford to lose Raphael Warnock in the Senate, Peter. He's one of the strongest environmental leaders we have -- fighting for equitable climate change policies, and growing clean energy jobs in Georgia. He has a _perfect_ 100% in LCV's _National Environmental Scorecard._

Meanwhile, Herschel Walker is on our _Dirty Dozen_ list -- one of the twelve worst anti-environmental candidates this election. He's a serial liar whose campaign has been dominated by scandals. He's a climate change denier. He's an _election denier_. And he's backed by both Trump and the oil industry.

Peter -- we can't let Walker win. But we have to scale up environmental turnout efforts in Fulton and Cobb counties -- **there 's a serious gap in our turnout efforts right now.**

[Support environmental turnout efforts in Georgia. Donate to LCV Victory Fund now and your contribution will be tripled.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

I know this election has already been a marathon. Thank you, Peter -- for everything you've done so far. We'll be in touch soon with more updates on Georgia.

Onward,

Pete Maysmith
Senior VP of Campaigns
LCV Victory Fund
_Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www.lcvvictoryfund.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate 's committee._

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8931879&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDQwODA0MQS2&spReportId=MTYyMDQwODA0MQS2). Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://www.lcv.org/) |

clean_body: We cannot allow Raphael Warnock to win on December 6th. | Friend, The Senate runoff in Georgia on December 6th will impact every single American. Inflation, recession, crime, unsecure borders, woke policies...and all the other lovely gifts from the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer cabal are only going to get worse unless we break the liberal chokehold on power. Unless you want to see more one-party Democrat rule in Washington, We cannot allow Warnock to win. Friend, that means we must help fund Herschel's runoff efforts against Warnock's multi-million-dollar war chest. | RUNOFF DONOR FILE SUPPORTER: Friend RUNOFF EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION: DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT We are at a crucial decision point. Either we help Herschel win...or we will watch the woke mob torch our nation's history. Senator Warnock represents the failed values and policies of Big Government Socialism. Herschel wants to restore America with common sense values and policies that work. That leads me to the heart of this email. Who would you like to see in the Senate from Georgia, Friend? Do you want to continue down the destructive path of Big Government Socialism with Warnock – or get back to an America that works for all Americans with Herschel? Thank you, Newt Gingrich | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Georgia Update
subject: [ALERT] Soros is Dumping Money in GA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
Bringing Black voters to the GOP is KEY to helping Herschel win next month!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918068:JwVcBmGNf:m:1:3253819041:4FE0F86B78A388B127071A7FCBFA8F0E:r "Headline") Peter: The Senate races in Arizona and Nevada were both within striking distance of flipping for the GOP...but that didn't happen. These were bitter losses -that will be questioned for a long time to come. But we've got another fight that needs to be won, and we can't afford to be demoralized for a moment. Electing the Republican candidate in Georgia, Herschel Walker, is the only way to help slow down Biden's agenda in the Senate. **We. Must. Help. Herschel. WIN!** **Campaign Finance records show that a Soros-backed PAC is dumping large sums of money targeting Black Voters to ensure Warnock defeats Herschel.** We have worked tirelessly for over a year on behalf of Herschel, but we need the resources to continue this all-important fight to conclusion. **[If you chip in $25, $50, $100, or more today, you can help stop Chuck Schumer, who will be the Majority Leader from simply rolling over Republicans at every turn in the next Congress.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918068:JwVcBmGNf:m:1:3253819041:4FE0F86B78A388B127071A7FCBFA8F0E:r "If you chip in $25, $50, $100, or more today, you can help stop
Chuck Schumer, who will be the Majority Leader from simply rolling over Republicans at every turn in the next Congress.")** We have the ability and the plan to help Herschel win, and we can help bring enough Black voters out for the GOP by December 6th. **We just need $83,928.21 to fully fund our "Get out the Republican vote" program in Black communities. The runoff election next month will depend on one thing and one thing only - turnout.** Warnock and the Democrats already think they've bought enough votes with liberal spending programs, loan forgiveness, defund policies, and their so-called fight for "abortion rights" Fortunately, we know that Black Voters, like most Americans, care about their family's safety and the high cost of living and prioritize kitchen table issues and belief in the Lord over allegiance to the Democrat Party, who has tried to keep them dependent on government handouts. And with your support, we'll be able to remind them that if Warnock wins the runoff, we're not going to be able to fix the damage he and Biden have done to this country. It's that simple! **[Will you help us reach our goal and help Herschel win the runoff? Donate TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918068:JwVcBmGNf:m:1:3253819041:4FE0F86B78A388B127071A7FCBFA8F0E:r "Will you help us reach our goal and help Herschel win the runoff?
Donate TODAY!")** | | [SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER WITH $50 ››](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918069:JwVcBmGNf:m:1:3253819041:4FE0F86B78A388B127071A7FCBFA8F0E:r "SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER WITH $50")

$100")

ANY $$$")

We can't let Georgia go the way of Arizona and Nevada. We must persuade a calculated number of Black voters to choose Herschel on December 6th and win this Senate race!
The Democrat Playbook of courting votes on false promises has been working for over six decades, and we can end it this year.
**Help us stop the Democrats. Help us push Herschel over the top next month.**
Help us bring Black voters to the Republican Party! **[Donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61918068:JwVcBmGNf:m:1:3253819041:4FE0F86B78A388B127071A7FCBFA8F0E:r "Donate today.")**

Campaign Finance records show that a Soros-backed PAC is dumping large sums of money targeting Black Voters to ensure Warnock defeats Herschel. We have worked tirelessly for over a year on behalf of Herschel, but we need the resources to continue this all-important fight to conclusion. "If you chip in $25, $50, $100, or more today, you can help stop Chuck Schumer, who will be the Majority Leader from simply rolling over Republicans at every turn in the next Congress." We have the ability and the plan to help Herschel win, and we can help bring enough Black voters out for the GOP by December 6th. We just need $83,928.21 to fully fund our "Get out the Republican vote" program in Black communities. The runoff election next month will depend on one thing and one thing only - turnout. Warnock and the Democrats already think they've bought enough votes with liberal spending programs, loan forgiveness, defund policies, and their so-called fight for "abortion rights" Fortunately, we know that Black Voters, like most Americans, care about their family's safety and the high cost of living and prioritize kitchen table issues and belief in the Lord over allegiance to the Democrat Party, who has tried to keep them dependent on government handouts. And with your support, we'll be able to remind them that if Warnock wins the runoff, we're not going to be able to fix the damage he and Biden have done to this country. It's that simple! "Will you help us reach our goal and help Herschel win the runoff? Donate TODAY!" | | "SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER WITH $50" | "SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER WITH $100" | "SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER WITH $250" | "SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER WITH ANY $$$" We can't let Georgia go the way of Arizona and Nevada. We must persuade a calculated number of Black voters to choose Herschel on December 6th and win this Senate race! The Democrat Playbook of courting votes on false promises has been working for over six decades, and we can end it this year. Help us stop the Democrats. Help us push Herschel over the top next month. Help us bring Black voters to the Republican Party! "Donate today." Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919697:60PnBmGdN:m:1:3371812801:1913459987DE2B04E1687F84D9F8CA6E:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919698:60PnBmGdN:m:1:3371812801:1913459987DE2B04E1687F84D9F8CA6E:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919697:60PnBmGdN:m:1:3371812801:1913459987DE2B04E1687F84D9F8CA6E:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919697:60PnBmGdN:m:1:3371812801:1913459987DE2B04E1687F84D9F8CA6E:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919697:60PnBmGdN:m:1:3371812801:1913459987DE2B04E1687F84D9F8CA6E:r)**

# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221120-8141-header&t=1&akid=8141%2E434096%2EBYP1JR)
Hey Derek, it’s John again.
After I reached out about my friend Rev. Raphael Warnock’s runoff election in Georgia last weekend, this team *really* stepped up.
