name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Last night’s devastating attack in Colorado Springs
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
An LGBTQ nightclub is meant to be a safe space to let go, dance with friends, and meet new people.
#

Friends -
Last night at Club Q in Colorado Springs should have been an opportunity for friends in the community to unwind on a Saturday night. An LGBTQ nightclub is meant to be a safe space to let go, dance with friends, and meet new people.
But instead, a gunman filled with hatred opened fire in the venue, taking the lives of five innocent people and injuring at least 18 more.
This act of gun violence is a devastating attack on the LGBTQ community. No one should fear for their lives because of who they are or who they love. Guns have made it too easy for people motivated by hate to turn what should have been a night of celebration into a night of tragedy.
Gun violence is not new to our Colorado communities. We’ve seen it in Boulder, Aurora, and Columbine. Now the state has been rocked by yet another senseless massacre. The United States is the only developed country in the world where tragedies like these happen so frequently.
Our hearts go out to the victims of last night’s deadly attack, but now is not a moment when we can just send thoughts and prayers.
Enough is enough.
We must pass the Disarm Hate Act to keep guns out of the hands of people motivated by hatred and bigotry. We will not rest at Giffords until our leaders take comprehensive action to make our communities safer, in Colorado and all across our nation.
\- Gabby Giffords

* * *
**Giffords PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to Giffords PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/23581?t=1&akid=2771%2E3935704%2EgwA2sr)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2771%2E3935704%2EgwA2sr) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
I’m honored to help bring up the next generation of Democratic leaders that will move our country forward.

---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54860437/379913701/1694321165?refcode=20221120_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzI1NWRmNy1mODY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gt2kARdvetmCMohJtAp8ItlQmdm58sqQeEYoXpckq3s=)
---
Can I have a moment?
I just announced that I am not running for the Democratic Leadership in the next Congress, but I will continue to represent my beloved San Francisco in the House of Representatives.
[I’m honored to help bring up the next generation of Democratic leaders that will move our country forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54860438/379913702/1694517773?refcode=20221120_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzI1NWRmNy1mODY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gt2kARdvetmCMohJtAp8ItlQmdm58sqQeEYoXpckq3s=)
And I couldn’t be more excited to see what they achieve. We’re in good hands.
But make no mistake: this does not mean I’m abandoning the fight to elect Democrats and protect our Democracy.
[**_So it is my honor to announce the Pelosi Legacy Fund to continue the work we started. Every dollar we raise will help fund our work to ELECT incredible Democrats, DEFEAT extremist Republicans who want to unroll our progress, and support our INCREDIBLE new Democratic Leadership that will fight for working families. I’m hoping for a historic show of support – 50,000 gifts before midnight – to show the country that Democrats are just getting started delivering for the American people. Can I count on you? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54860439/379913703/1694517773?refcode=20221120_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzI1NWRmNy1mODY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gt2kARdvetmCMohJtAp8ItlQmdm58sqQeEYoXpckq3s=)

Team – Brianna here. I can’t believe it’s been a whole year since Michigan voters secured fair maps through the new Michigan Independent Citizens Redistricting Commission (MICRC).

Fair maps and histroic ballot proposals drove record turnout in Michigan this fall and the results are making a splash in headlines! Check out the latest news:
**"Redistricting giving West Michigan political landscape 'clean slate'"** \-- Fox 17

**"Michigan, California and Vermont Affirm Abortion Rights in Ballot Proposals"** \-- _New York Times_

**"Michigan’s 2022 midterm election set record in voter turnout"** \-- _MLive_
[**Rush a donation to help All On The Line’s work in advocating for fair maps and empowering voters, like in our work in Michigan.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54867568/379937636/-1411470677?refcode=20221120_AOTL_F_mihightlight_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiOTRmMzEyLTI3NjktZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xdHBgq3Y9VuXJFsktwmtt12QLkpHvc94LnrzuSEXBso=)

As a Michigan native, I’m so excited to see the progress Michiganders fought for over the past few years, everything from reclaiming the pen in redistricting, expanding voting rights, protecting access to abortions and keeping election deniers out of the state legislature. **I hope you are, too, because we did not achieve this movement's success without Michiganders and All On The Line’s grassroots support like you.**

There was a long road to progress in places like Michigan. We prevailed against **_significant challenges_** over the years to reach this critical point. Here's a quick rundown of how Michiganders secured a fair map.
* In 2018, 61% of Michigan voters backed a redistricting plan to assure equal state and federal representation.
* The MICRC convened in-person and virtual hearings and processed over 500 public comments in 2021 to generate congressional and state legislature maps ON TIME.
* Before the 2022 election on these maps, map manipulators so anxious to stay in power attempted to eliminate the MICRC, rejecting the people's will and removing a voter-protection amendment in Michigan. They failed.
* All On The Line's partnership with Power The Polls helped recruit 195 volunteers to serve as poll workers.

Yes, it took a lot of work. **This is why grassroots support from people like you is vital to ensure our work continues when future challenges arise that undermine the people's voice. We will be there prepared and ready -- to combat the anti-democratic tactics of map manipulators.**

**[Team, if you want to continue to strengthen our democracy by protecting fair maps, now and in the future, will you chip in to support All On The Line today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54867570/379937638/-1411470677?refcode=20221120_AOTL_F_mihightlight_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiOTRmMzEyLTI3NjktZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xdHBgq3Y9VuXJFsktwmtt12QLkpHvc94LnrzuSEXBso=)**

clean_body: | Team – Brianna here. I can’t believe it’s been a whole year since Michigan voters secured fair maps through the new Michigan Independent Citizens Redistricting Commission (MICRC). Fair maps and histroic ballot proposals drove record turnout in Michigan this fall and the results are making a splash in headlines! Check out the latest news: "Redistricting giving West Michigan political landscape 'clean slate'" \-- Fox 17 "Michigan, California and Vermont Affirm Abortion Rights in Ballot Proposals" \-- New York Times "Michigan’s 2022 midterm election set record in voter turnout" \-- MLive = = As a Michigan native, I’m so excited to see the progress Michiganders fought for over the past few years, everything from reclaiming the pen in redistricting, expanding voting rights, protecting access to abortions and keeping election deniers out of the state legislature. I hope you are, too, because we did not achieve this movement's success without Michiganders and All On The Line’s grassroots support like you. There was a long road to progress in places like Michigan. We prevailed against significant challenges over the years to reach this critical point. Here's a quick rundown of how Michiganders secured a fair map. In 2018, 61% of Michigan voters backed a redistricting plan to assure equal state and federal representation. The MICRC convened in-person and virtual hearings and processed over 500 public comments in 2021 to generate congressional and state legislature maps ON TIME. Before the 2022 election on these maps, map manipulators so anxious to stay in power attempted to eliminate the MICRC, rejecting the people's will and removing a voter-protection amendment in Michigan. They failed. All On The Line's partnership with Power The Polls helped recruit 195 volunteers to serve as poll workers. Yes, it took a lot of work. This is why grassroots support from people like you is vital to ensure our work continues when future challenges arise that undermine the people's voice. We will be there prepared and ready -- to combat the anti-democratic tactics of map manipulators. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = In solidarity, Brianna Shamsuddoha Interim Mobilization Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919660:6xKC9mGN5:m:1:3371220873:EBAAF747CEF6079D26330FCAB464B693:r)**

Herschel Walker

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. Thanks, P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Georgia is the 2nd most expensive state to vote in.
body:
Sen. Herschel Walker?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf10255f1-7820-490d-8a12-219ddd2cd1ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between a Senator Warnock and a Senator (gulp...) Herschel Walker._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29fffea6-c1c4-4ec0-b2bc-6426130c6146/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Sadly, we were not able to end Lauren Boebert's political career this time due to only 554 votes. 554. Alternatively, our great ally Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes. In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right._** **_Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast.__ _** **_It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor._ **
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Get out the vote in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T721b30bb-5067-4fc8-a594-e7bf4ed9813d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_In only six days--next Saturday--early voting in Georgia begins. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker? _** [**_Can you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get Georgia Democrats to the polls to strengthen The Peach State and America?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f972d73-5e53-4ea6-a8f0-8ce8d3171bdf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy.**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9f980a7-cdd2-40c6-9205-0aa8f479f0c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/warnock-costofvotesingeorgia-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf382d9c6-62b4-4515-ae43-9ac4a29673dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m personally asking you for a favor Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919348:6SIjtmGwN:m:1:3317145305:841CCA5034A1CD2B7AE8EE78A0853011:r)**

[** Chip in before Midnight -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919348:6SIjtmGwN:m:1:3317145305:841CCA5034A1CD2B7AE8EE78A0853011:r)
We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $25, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919348:6SIjtmGwN:m:1:3317145305:841CCA5034A1CD2B7AE8EE78A0853011:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in $25 or even $34 to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919348:6SIjtmGwN:m:1:3317145305:841CCA5034A1CD2B7AE8EE78A0853011:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919348:6SIjtmGwN:m:1:3317145305:841CCA5034A1CD2B7AE8EE78A0853011:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Candidate Spotlight: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
body:
Dedicated to service and protecting Nevada

| | |
---
Friend,
---
| | Sheriff Joe Lombardo has dedicated his life to service. First in the United States Army, then in the National Guard and Army Reserve. He didn’t stop there. After fighting for our country, he went on to serve his community in law enforcement for 30 years, working his way up to Sheriff of Clark County, Nevada. Nevadans have seen firsthand the bold courage and dedication Joe Lombardo brings to the table. That’s why when he set out to become Nevada's next governor, the people of his state proudly voted him into office. Not only were they tired of the destruction that came from failed Democrat policies, they were confident that Sheriff Joe Lombardo will bring the conservative solutions they’re looking for. That’s why Nevada elected Sheriff Joe Lombardo and flipped the governor’s seat back into the hands of a strong Republican leader.
---
---
I’m honored to have traveled to Nevada to rally behind Joe Lombardo, and I’m excited to see what he’ll do in office. I know he will make a fantastic governor and continue to be a dedicated servant and courageous leader for the people of his state. My very best,
---
---
Nikki Haley
---
|
---

name: VP Mike Pence
subject: Want a signed copy of my new book?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
I’m so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

| |
---
| | | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=7011b315e07c47f1bf1863a867a175a5&_t=LI_GSHAjrVfK8iof7tQB03NtlxeYAnob0l7nyQCvx8TB55chnX1cYPjGRKMr1iXdrBpAeoAWRGiU6PHnN9p6f9tbDIBAqogdNPWqevsxI20%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=7011b315e07c47f1bf1863a867a175a5&_t=LI_GSHAjrVfK8iof7tQB03NtlxeYAnob0l7nyQCvx8TB55chnX1cYPjGRKMr1iXdrBpAeoAWRGiU6PHnN9p6f9tbDIBAqogdNPWqevsxI20%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7011b315e07c47f1bf1863a867a175a5&_e=gwS9Cet1KXs8dJiA-Q6qy-UPLYQX8MZbtTuZU2tiKZFzTlb_2wx3vNkJ4DqdBVN2UJYI-KvQ8DxcPqRsoTBJA5F5m88h5DZUwu7AKjYhe1Itgk-Qr-w3QMFRiNf0ObiuFWY-gW3Wd8rSd6cHfrAFJxUQHjjdvTZchM1tScUTzkX84_i3pA0oDWFJtXqSlpPtghXAVt4iJjTqQ16wfWvnY_4HkhBsOQ2VDuaMYYJ5FKlsWoEM81BrqRE7JeIIbnJmjikRMiYDTaabfoRSMr3Baydtjgd953rk4B3hjtko22XMVnbJrh9KJlwIJfdEOnrlOBP0YQKDMoEhqMuF8AUsiyv0Z_1V7HbOx9CVkdg4no2NTzuO7GfaIsub1olSLK1_Jqs3NblHeCuzmooC1e9aBV71PnBLB_kzB6lQH9QA1gA%3D)
---

I'm so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

I've set aside a FREE signed copy of my new book just for you. Here's the situation:

My new book - "So Help Me God" \- will give you an exclusive look into my life in public service and all the incredible figures that helped me live it, from my Irish immigrant grandfather to my combat veteran father and my unstoppable 90 years young mother. Each played a role in helping me achieve my American dream.

I know it's hard to believe, but I used to be a Democrat! We all make mistakes... One man drew me to the Republican movement through moments with a force I was never able to shake: Ronald Reagan. He reminded me of my lifelong love for the Constitution of the United States, and how conservative values are at the core of the American way of life.

He shaped my path, one that led to lessons in my early days that I carried with me all the way to the White House.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

That's why I asked my team to reserve a signed copy of my book for you!

All you have to do is chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, and I'll send you a signed copy.

It's a win-win situation: you get a signed copy of the book and also help us get back to the policies that worked so well during the Trump-Pence Administration!

---
| | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7011b315e07c47f1bf1863a867a175a5&_e=gwS9Cet1KXs8dJiA-Q6qy-UPLYQX8MZbtTuZU2tiKZFzTlb_2wx3vNkJ4DqdBVN2UJYI-KvQ8DxcPqRsoTBJA5F5m88h5DZUwu7AKjYhe1Itgk-Qr-w3QMFRiNf0ObiuFWY-gW3Wd8rSd6cHfrAFJxUQHjjdvTZchM1tScUTzkX84_i3pA0oDWFJtXqSlpPtghXAVt4iJjTqQ16wfWvnY_4HkhBsOQ2VDuaMYYJ5FKlsWoEM81BrqRE7JeIIbnJmjikRMiYDTaabfoRSMr3Ba67RvNrwqBtolfoQl-PSQktcnkuN9984L5Nr58bZ5CSHn4gu_XNYS8YYdfXstqzhKyLHWVeJTaqXIQWvG2kdN8r40ibKs7q0PIwWodE-CYQnltevguFSmENdKhSyU9RebQ5oMCLT4k18VmjVBtvAC9E%3D)
---

I look forward to signing a book for you soon!

In Faith & Freedom,
Mike Pence
48th Vice President of The United States

---
|
---
| Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
---

801 Pennsylvania Ave Ste 930
Washington, DC 20004

Each played a role in helping me achieve my American dream. I know it's hard to believe, but I used to be a Democrat! We all make mistakes... One man drew me to the Republican movement through moments with a force I was never able to shake: Ronald Reagan. He reminded me of my lifelong love for the Constitution of the United States, and how conservative values are at the core of the American way of life. He shaped my path, one that led to lessons in my early days that I carried with me all the way to the White House. I can't wait to share this journey with you. That's why I asked my team to reserve a signed copy of my book for you! All you have to do is chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, and I'll send you a signed copy. It's a win-win situation: you get a signed copy of the book and also help us get back to the policies that worked so well during the Trump-Pence Administration! | | I look forward to signing a book for you soon! In Faith & Freedom, Mike Pence 48th Vice President of The United States | | Paid for by Advancing American Freedom 801 Pennsylvania Ave Ste 930 Washington, DC 20004

name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Stand in solidarity with Starbucks workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Their struggle is our struggle.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221120-3634-header&t=1&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0)
With Starbucks workers on strike nationwide, now is an important time to show that we stand in solidarity with them. Taking on a large corporation like Starbucks is not easy — but we can do it, as long as we're all in it together.
That's why we are asking you directly:
[Can you please make a $3 contribution to the Starbucks Workers Fund today? 100% of your contribution will go toward workers at Starbucks engaged in workplace activism and organizing.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221120-starbucks.MZec_w&refcode=em20221120-3634-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221120-starbucks.MZec_w&refcode=em20221120-3634-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0)**
This past Thursday, all across the country, Starbucks workers went on strike at over 100 stores, demanding that the company meet them at the bargaining table to negotiate over workplace issues, such as chronic short staffing. They are courageously taking on a multi-billion dollar corporation to say enough is enough. **It's time for Starbucks to treat its workers with dignity and respect**.
Over the past year, Starbucks Workers United has unionized 165 Starbucks stores in 36 states and Washington, D.C. Not only are Starbucks shops voting to unionize, they are voting pro-union in overwhelming numbers. Their grassroots organizing campaign has an incredible 82% win rate and 59 unanimous union election wins.
Starbucks has responded with an unprecedented union busting campaign by firing over 130 union leaders, threatening and surveilling workers, refusing to bargain in good faith, and closing union stores. The National Labor Relations Board has already found merit in over 900 separate allegations of employer misconduct.
At a time of extreme (and growing) income and wealth inequality, the working class of this country is telling billionaires and large corporations that they cannot continue to exploit workers while they make millions in profit. They are making it clear that we cannot continue to tolerate a system where the very rich get richer, while working families struggle to put food on the table.
Alexandria has been proud to stand with Starbucks workers throughout their unionization efforts. **Because in our view, there is no way we can transform this country in a progressive direction without a strong trade union movement.**
So today we’re asking you to do something important to stand in solidarity with Starbucks workers organizing for better wages and working conditions.
[Can you please make a $3 contribution to the Starbucks Workers Fund today? Their struggle is our struggle, which is why we must stand together.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221120-starbucks.MZec_w&refcode=em20221120-3634-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0)
Thank you for pitching in if you’re able to, and as always, thank you for being such a key part of this movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221120-starbucks?refcode=em20221120-3634-P_FND_ANO_GRM&t=23&refcode2=3634_2526796_sVT7f0&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221120-3634-P_FND_ANO_GRM&t=24&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=3634%2E2526796%2EsVT7f0)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Katie Porter
subject: Reaching out to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
I’m the single mom with the whiteboard in Congress!
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ)
Hey Derek,
I’m Katie Porter. If you’re wondering who I am, I’d say **first and foremost I’m a single parent of three school aged kids. Second, I’m a progressive member of Congress.** And I’m not here to put up with BS from Big Oil and Big Pharma executives. I’m fighting to lower costs for families, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and protect our environment from greedy polluters.
**You may also know me as the lady you’ve seen on C-SPAN with a whiteboard.** As a former teacher, it was only natural I brought a whiteboard to Congress. It’s been a very helpful tool in illustrating some of the corruption and greed we’ve seen from government officials and powerful CEOs, and it’s also helpful for showing how grassroots supporters truly power our campaign.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13807?refcode=EMZ01_AWS_202211_V1_A&t=2&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ)
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13807?refcode=EMZ01_AWS_202211_V1_A&t=3&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ)
I don’t take any money from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or executives at Big Oil companies or Wall Street banks. Our movement’s greatest strength is our grassroots supporters, and I would be so appreciative if you made your first donation today.
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13808?refcode=EMZ01_AWS_202211_V1_A&t=4&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ) [Donate $25 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13809?refcode=EMZ01_AWS_202211_V1_A&t=5&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13810?refcode=EMZ01_AWS_202211_V1_A&t=6&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13811?refcode=EMZ01_AWS_202211_V1_A&t=7&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13812?refcode=EMZ01_AWS_202211_V1_A&t=8&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13807?refcode=EMZ01_AWS_202211_V1_A&t=9&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ)
---
Thanks for considering, Derek. I’m so happy to have you on our team!
Onward,
Katie
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13807?refcode=EMZ01_AWS_202211_V1_A&t=10&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=11&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=15476%2E3422442%2EadBQWQ).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: devastating update (from unitedemocrats.org)
subject: re: huge COLLAPSE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
We need your help, Peter.

| Peter -- We're devastated.

We have been raising money to invest in Georgia so Democrats can SAVE the Senate in the runoff election, but donations have fallen off a cliff.

[**It's hard for us to ask, but can you rush a $3 donation right this moment? We're way behind on our $20,000 Save Georgia Funding goal, and we risk Democrats losing everything if we don't recover »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54863489/379923359/-253359397?amount=3&refcode=UD_20221120_EMDF_E2_T0_CL_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZWE2YWJhLTA5NjktZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QmkUP7bh9aSSAtewLQZ3ZRMj4TgQMb0gJkYgw4_FpAM=)

Peter, we can prove it! Look at our ActBlue donations yesterday and today. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54863490/379923360/-253359397?amount=3&refcode=UD_20221120_EMDF_E2_T0_CL_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZWE2YWJhLTA5NjktZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QmkUP7bh9aSSAtewLQZ3ZRMj4TgQMb0gJkYgw4_FpAM=) We'll just say it bluntly: **This is NOT going to be enough to save Georgia.**

Republicans are already spending over $50 MILLION to crush us and lie to voters about Raphael Warnock. It's disgusting.

| | Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn.** And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense.

**We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I'd like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=974e6ff448c44b6ea16c4456fb3e296f&_e=wnoB7mEVtqxJUNJP4QswmHrtriwjq9gA2A52hiN2mWGpPjF9BRUaW4QoYfMJ6PEExrrcl4Kp2Jzq_2S7Jnu63ELSWxrWdzxUzJID43IOFVJmQodSwUTcpsxCxEwlTGrUKqIPeehdrKlyPt2SZ_u76PLw3L-sTnSGLsyZNLeCoLiL7u7j2sf-LaLohGyF3tdE_WbAo7OS8dbkdhEzsdu0KD_BjOdQGFg2CBGJyyH-2xqBJFCUbK-61h8kgdqaG8jeZigo1YNb7Df3p44XIqgApO2ywUWnwhH9e1dt5FQcjXTnozYrGWYAhwOJjJxVVu6ry7Z83MWBUizYlL-b_IeQAQ%3D%3D)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake.)

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What 's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach 's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that 's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** "They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."
**
That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=974e6ff448c44b6ea16c4456fb3e296f&_e=wnoB7mEVtqxJUNJP4QswmHrtriwjq9gA2A52hiN2mWGpPjF9BRUaW4QoYfMJ6PEExrrcl4Kp2Jzq_2S7Jnu63ELSWxrWdzxUzJID43IOFVJmQodSwUTcpsxCxEwlTGrUKqIPeehdrKlyPt2SZ_u76PLw3L-sTnSGLsyZNLeCoLiL7u7j2sf-LaLohGyF3tdEutQZJmcx8uyhNiyN8CiFx4tlny5RyxbXoMTTfZc0dvfBBdd0cLo0F894Dw-gjHGC4MQsAWgFBj7q3MoLSktV_JQurdKcaUdShvzH3kUUi9tm932_VfPr1GuMyVl-KvohI7aq1cSXBHz5X1wHsoSliw%3D%3D)
I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=974e6ff448c44b6ea16c4456fb3e296f&_e=wnoB7mEVtqxJUNJP4QswmHrtriwjq9gA2A52hiN2mWGpPjF9BRUaW4QoYfMJ6PEExrrcl4Kp2Jzq_2S7Jnu63ELSWxrWdzxUzJID43IOFVJmQodSwUTcpsxCxEwlTGrUKqIPeehdrKlyPt2SZ_u76PLw3L-sTnSGLsyZNLeCoLiL7u7j2sf-LaLohGyF3tdEjmb8aCOYhU1Q3cuOLYDyfvSeIamb_f8KrZNCHqTIARMpPXyO692KNuee6PeeZLvGYJWJ9oSCpf4mKAoavEShAUE3sPH5hOrNw3wDZj2UxO8rAJvCg4ou1FpcwA8AauDAEUKNGF8SySsZBborcItEeQ%3D%3D)

Larry Hogan called the 2022 midterm the third election that Republicans lost under Donald Trump** ** — 'three strikes and you’re out.'"_

**Below is an excerpt from his speech: ** _“Last week, Biden said he’s not going to change any of his policies these next two years. He has apparently learned nothing from last week’s election._ _Our party can not afford to make that same mistake._ _Look, I’ve always been a guy who tells it like it is. So let me just give it to you straight tonight._ _A party that lost the popular vote in seven out of the last eight presidential elections, and that couldn’t even beat Joe Biden, is desperately in need of a course correction._ _We should give Donald Trump all the credit he deserves for his accomplishments in office. He cut taxes, unleashed the power of our domestic energy production, nominated great justices to the supreme court, and his policies for Israel were the strongest we’ve ever had._ _Trump said we would be winning so much we’d get tired of winning. Well, I’m sick and tired of our party losing. This is the third election in a row that we lost and should have won._ _T_ _hree strikes – you’re out._ _If you repeatedly lose to a really bad team, it is time for new leadership. The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting a different result._ _We have a lot of talented leaders and voices in the Republican party. Many of them are here at RJC this weekend._ _Last week, the voters sent a clear message that they want to turn the page._ _It’s time for the GOP to move forward, not to keep looking backward. To grow the tent, not shrink it.”_

name: Jason Lindsay, Pride Fund
subject: SIGN Our Card: Another Mass Shooting at an LGBTQ Club
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter, Early this morning, a 22-year-old with a heart full of hate, carrying an assault rifle and multiple guns, entered a LGBTQ nightclub and immediately opened fire. He killed five people and injured 25 others. The latest mass shooting in America happened at Club Q in Colorado Springs, Colorado. The shooting ended due to the heroic acts of several patrons inside the club overpowering the shooter, who is in police custody. This shooting is a tragedy in every aspect, so many lives lost and so many others injured. A local community reeling from the tragedy. But it goes beyond that. This is the second time a gunman chose an LGBTQ safe space as their target.

On June 12th, 2016, a gunman entered Pulse, a LGBTQ night club in Orlando, Florida, killing 49 people, injuring 53 others, and permanently scarring countless others who were there at the club or who lost a loved one that night. This act of hate against our community was the worst mass shooting in U.S. history at the time, but is now the second worst, following behind Las Vegas. That tragedy is what sparked the vision for me to create Pride Fund to End Gun Violence in the days after that attack, as a way to represent the LGBTQ community in the gun reform movement and mobilize our community alongside our allies to fight for changes to our gun laws. Pride Fund spends a lot of our time in the elections process, because the only way to change our laws is to defeat NRA backed Republicans in critical elections around the country so that Democrats can move legislation.

Our hearts go out to the LGBTQ community in Colorado Springs, and to our community in Orlando. This is a fresh tragedy that is only beginning to settle in for Colorado Springs, and a tough, difficult path to healing is ahead. In Orlando and around the country, Pulse survivors and loved ones who died are reliving the pain they felt in 2016. They all need our support.

I ask you to please sign our digital card to send your message of love and support to the LGBTQ communities in Colorado Springs and Orlando. Let us show them how much we care and that we stand beside them.

[Click here: https://act.myngp.com/Forms/5219618085308402432](https://act.myngp.com/el/019QOWnGknRJ9mvcY02hfN85xd_dCZauvjEMw8n0nWU=/5hwiHXE9LapgtLQNQt1tWE_n4BYHzzgoDY8BANl77Nk=)

Sincerely,

Jason Lindsay
Founder
Pride Fund to End Gun Violence |

This act of hate against our community was the worst mass shooting in U.S. history at the time, but is now the second worst, following behind Las Vegas. That tragedy is what sparked the vision for me to create Pride Fund to End Gun Violence in the days after that attack, as a way to represent the LGBTQ community in the gun reform movement and mobilize our community alongside our allies to fight for changes to our gun laws. Pride Fund spends a lot of our time in the elections process, because the only way to change our laws is to defeat NRA backed Republicans in critical elections around the country so that Democrats can move legislation. Our hearts go out to the LGBTQ community in Colorado Springs, and to our community in Orlando. This is a fresh tragedy that is only beginning to settle in for Colorado Springs, and a tough, difficult path to healing is ahead. In Orlando and around the country, Pulse survivors and loved ones who died are reliving the pain they felt in 2016. They all need our support. I ask you to please sign our digital card to send your message of love and support to the LGBTQ communities in Colorado Springs and Orlando. Let us show them how much we care and that we stand beside them. = Sincerely, Jason Lindsay Founder Pride Fund to End Gun Violence | ---|--- | To help us grow this movement, will you please forward this email to 2 friends to get them involved? Not subscribed to Pride Fund's emails? = | | Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Georgians voted early in record numbers during the midterms. And we’re committed to continuing this streak by leading a massive mobilization effort and pouring our resources into the counties that need it most in this must-win, neck-and-neck race between voting rights champion Sen. Warnock and deeply unqualified anti-voter extremist Herschel Walker.
If we hit this goal by tomorrow, we’ll be able to scale up our work to reach voters in every corner of the state and inform them about key voting dates, make sure every eligible voter knows how to cast their ballots, ensure every vote is counted, and respond to any voter challenges that may arise. And we’re counting on supporters like you to help sustain and expand our resources.
[_**Please make a $20 contribution to Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund before tomorrow at midnight to power this critical work. Hi, friend, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.
Since our runoff race began, thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign. I'm grateful.
Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority come December 6.
**But at this critical moment,****we're still falling $13,963 short of our midnight fundraising goal, and time is running out to close the gap.** With the GOP pouring over $37 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, missing this goal is simply not an option.
**In a race this _neck and neck_ , every single grassroots contribution, every single goal reached, could mean the difference between winning and losing. [So please, friend, I'm urgently asking: Will you rush $5 or more now – before our midnight deadline – to win in Georgia and expand the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54864227/379927414/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5128-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDgxY2RlZC0wZDY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUEKBdyPfvAZ2-QxHZSkWETJBWJoewe80eyTIETGgbg=)**

name: Herschel Walker and Lindsey Graham
subject: Sean Hannity’s challenge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
You won’t believe this video we recorded after a campaign rally, Fellow American. |
---

Fellow American,

Sean Hannity challenged us on national tv.

Well...actually, he challenged _Lindsey_. Sean doubted that Lindsey could 10 or even 20 push-ups.

When the interview ended, Lindsey came up with the #34 Challenge.

name: VP Mike Pence
subject: Have you gotten a copy of my book yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
I’m so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

| |
---
| | | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=8707d18149f0474b89bb73f27eb0de0b&_t=GOzycZa4jecIX-WP6__VhI8Gb_x4ctLNUOEfOqC0d69esl16w81V1Ph_tLq6M02HFp6VxCZ8Hk0RYB6gXU_Utt6gnVTYhOW5jh5UT4Y5UmQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=8707d18149f0474b89bb73f27eb0de0b&_t=GOzycZa4jecIX-WP6__VhI8Gb_x4ctLNUOEfOqC0d69esl16w81V1Ph_tLq6M02HFp6VxCZ8Hk0RYB6gXU_Utt6gnVTYhOW5jh5UT4Y5UmQ%3D)

| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8707d18149f0474b89bb73f27eb0de0b&_e=_D36XIixIblI64bCnvEornV5sscZDJWMtfUZKBhiFBpRo15SZ5sS0Bdu-VgtggjxA99uk7xDnp1cx4vlilvvihT__HwBmiY3cWOfStxRPEVM_vGRgOpDAGCBK-VZHZivpVFjbTz8ZQjIzS8apZyNPAEm1Qwka46xpHyTdGbKoOqomi9D9pxtwID8QkW_Z0pU5Y0iZbYEKtp05xOD6x2ZGkSM_8HXaD-X87WOnUP-Eekbnco_Uj78Q-pNdp6RIiljeBJMufMLdpkskR0-3i1uT8RQVxCmjo29yOaK6KGTEjL1fBfmmAO1-S4ch--4ju8yMb8NrbJNdLmAmVqICaVBrQs-gpRwQc8gNmj4wqC-WSVUszJIaEOcGYW669bF1kSk4GA0Y8rchUvgoit2Ir5N24Nnqv4s5ta7A3r0I60drN0%3D)
---

I'm so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

I've set aside a FREE signed copy of my new book just for you. Here's the situation:

My new book - "So Help Me God" \- will give you an exclusive look into my life in public service and all the incredible figures that helped me live it, from my Irish immigrant grandfather to my combat veteran father and my unstoppable 90 years young mother. Each played a role in helping me achieve my American dream.

I know it's hard to believe, but I used to be a Democrat! We all make mistakes... One man drew me to the Republican movement through moments with a force I was never able to shake: Ronald Reagan. He reminded me of my lifelong love for the Constitution of the United States, and how conservative values are at the core of the American way of life.

He shaped my path, one that led to lessons in my early days that I carried with me all the way to the White House.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

That's why I asked my team to reserve a signed copy of my book for you!

All you have to do is chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, and I'll send you a signed copy.

It's a win-win situation: you get a signed copy of the book and also help us get back to the policies that worked so well during the Trump-Pence Administration!

---
| | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8707d18149f0474b89bb73f27eb0de0b&_e=_D36XIixIblI64bCnvEornV5sscZDJWMtfUZKBhiFBpRo15SZ5sS0Bdu-VgtggjxA99uk7xDnp1cx4vlilvvihT__HwBmiY3cWOfStxRPEVM_vGRgOpDAGCBK-VZHZivpVFjbTz8ZQjIzS8apZyNPAEm1Qwka46xpHyTdGbKoOqomi9D9pxtwID8QkW_Z0pU5Y0iZbYEKtp05xOD6x2ZGkSM_8HXaD-X87WOnUP-Eekbnco_Uj78Q-pNdp6RIiljeBJMufMLdpkskR0-3i1uTxXciXQwrN-shPCbJx4W_TIj4iyPfcCz3lHOGQH1Ds4ATdw1YPYleAsAfiM-hn6KzG17mI6z6p54oETgu-zGi5Dy_4emOaiw9piK-KX_61KXGesZsnCrHqAJ-X9u7V85H4QqD1ctDnIbuKHvPtbvaDw%3D)
---

I look forward to signing a book for you soon!

In Faith & Freedom,
Mike Pence
48th Vice President of The United States

---
|
---
| Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
---

801 Pennsylvania Ave Ste 930
Washington, DC 20004

[Privacy Policy](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8707d18149f0474b89bb73f27eb0de0b&_e=_D36XIixIblI64bCnvEorvTrwjIOTjdLbTYZRmLMvPFvj-2DSN4YBTv4bkRhV5XefxzDqd33JMPEtGf4NqQ-u1yLiGuxs3_Ao909FXNpg4aqyyc6jPTtM13EEvys9SZx5ny6xW-_tPb7MfioRUjFwtY2u1sPBzB_l1eu5TIIvjh_xUy6m9bIR4Z7GxG8sqTyEobdUciiP4wZutcNTjjiGpOqYU1aYFVAH2x4Xh1DETk%3D)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: You are not our personal ATM
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Too many organizations see their grassroots supporters as their personal
ATM. They use scare tactics, guilt, and misleading language to coax people
into donating. Peter,
we will never do that to you.

Instead, we honestly ask for support from our grassroots base — because
our work to recruit and elect Justice Democrats who will transform the
Democratic Party requires significant resources.

Make no mistake, sometimes being up against the political establishment
can be scary. When far-right groups like AIPAC are dropping millions
against our candidates, the situation does become urgent.

But at JD, we want to inspire you to take action — not scare you. It comes
down to this: YOU are the heart of this work,
Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121582?refcode=em20221120-26167&t=1002&akid=26167%2E1203867%2EHGcQkD ]That’s why we’re respectfully asking: will you make a $5 donation so we
can continue to recruit more Justice Democrats and grow the Squad?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121581?refcode=em20221120-26167&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26167%2E1203867%2EHGcQkD ]Contribute

Even if you can’t chip in today, know that we are deeply grateful to have
you in the movement with us, and hope you find value in each of these
messages.

Thank you for fighting in this movement with us.

With gratitude,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26167%2E1203867%2EHGcQkD ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26167%2E1203867%2EHGcQkD ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221120-26167-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26167_1203867_HGcQkD&akid=26167%2E1203867%2EHGcQkD

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26167%2E1203867%2EHGcQkD

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Add your name to support Electrifying America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Sign my petition >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54878843/379970867/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20221120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODMwMTI0NC0zZDY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Xv79qK0Wvjh-Sw4STG_EB3oUnZoUuIxNBSv97lyx5A=&emci=e8469343-8467-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=58301244-3d69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=252045)
---
Great news, folks — The Biden administration committed to a global agreement to accelerate zero-emissions transport for commercial vehicles like buses and tractor trailers at the United Nations’ climate change conference, COP27, this past week. I was proud to work with a group of fellow lawmakers to call for this commitment — **which will help protect our planet for future generations.** We’ve made incredible steps as a country to reduce emissions, cut energy costs, and electrify our nation — from the COP27 agreement, to the investment in our first nationwide electric vehicle charging network in the bipartisan infrastructure law, to my provisions in the _Inflation Reduction Act_ that will save New Mexicans who electrify their households an average of hundreds of dollars a year. **But our work isn’t over yet. As co-chair of the bicameral Electrification Caucus, I won’t stop pushing to pass laws that help cut emissions and take on climate change.** [**If you support finding more solutions to Electrify America, reduce pollution, and put money back in folks’ pockets, add your name:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54878844/379970868/-111834432?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20221120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODMwMTI0NC0zZDY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Xv79qK0Wvjh-Sw4STG_EB3oUnZoUuIxNBSv97lyx5A=&emci=e8469343-8467-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=58301244-3d69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54878845/379970869/-111834432?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20221120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODMwMTI0NC0zZDY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Xv79qK0Wvjh-Sw4STG_EB3oUnZoUuIxNBSv97lyx5A=&emci=e8469343-8467-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=58301244-3d69-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you for speaking up on this critical issue.
— Martin
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54878846/379970870/1569788089?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20221120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODMwMTI0NC0zZDY5LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Xv79qK0Wvjh-Sw4STG_EB3oUnZoUuIxNBSv97lyx5A=)

clean_body: Sign my petition >> Great news, folks — The Biden administration committed to a global agreement to accelerate zero-emissions transport for commercial vehicles like buses and tractor trailers at the United Nations’ climate change conference, COP27, this past week. I was proud to work with a group of fellow lawmakers to call for this commitment — which will help protect our planet for future generations. We’ve made incredible steps as a country to reduce emissions, cut energy costs, and electrify our nation — from the COP27 agreement, to the investment in our first nationwide electric vehicle charging network in the bipartisan infrastructure law, to my provisions in the Inflation Reduction Act that will save New Mexicans who electrify their households an average of hundreds of dollars a year. But our work isn’t over yet. As co-chair of the bicameral Electrification Caucus, I won’t stop pushing to pass laws that help cut emissions and take on climate change. | Thank you for speaking up on this critical issue. — Martin = | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A winning mandate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter, Americans voted for our progressive agenda. Now, we have the most progressive Democratic caucus in decades.
#
Peter, there’s no doubt about it -- 2022’s midterm elections were BIG for progressives.
Though pundits doubted the power of our progressive movement -- and our ability to win competitive races -- we proved them wrong, electing more progressives to the House than ever before.
Peter, here’s how we did it:
* The most progressive generation -- young voters -- showed up to the polls this year, with the second highest turnout among voters between 18-29 in 30 years!
* Our team knocked thousands of doors, called 90,000 voters, and traveled the country sharing our progressive message -- even going to purple and red districts.
* Even with dark money groups spending MILLIONS against progressive candidates this cycle, our candidates overcame this spending with the help of grassroots donors.
* Countless hours of hard work by activists and organizers -- many young people, people of color, and women -- laid the groundwork that held off the so-called ‘red wave’ that never happened.

Progressives across the country emerged victorious in elections across federal, state and local levels. We should all celebrate AND recommit to our fight for a progressive future.
**With this mandate in mind, we need to use the power of the Presidency, the Senate and House progressives to deliver for working people who got us here.[Peter, will you help me continue building our progressive power with a contribution today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23485?refcode=em20221120-1867&t=1&akid=1867%2E420207%2Eibj6xU)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23485?refcode=em20221120-1867&t=20&akid=1867%2E420207%2Eibj6xU)**
Peter, Americans voted for our progressive agenda. Now, we have the most progressive Democratic caucus in decades.
One thing is clear: progressives win elections, even in “red” and “purple” areas. Our movement’s strength is growing because of our advocacy.
[**With these wins under our belt, we’re going to keep fighting for the bold change we need. Will you help us start the new Congress strong with a $3 donation today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23485?refcode=em20221120-1867&t=21&akid=1867%2E420207%2Eibj6xU)
As always, thank you for your support.
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221120-1867-footer&t=22&refcode2=1867_420207_ibj6xU&akid=1867%2E420207%2Eibj6xU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1867%2E420207%2Eibj6xU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1867%2E420207%2Eibj6xU)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d11217c980344e8eacbb3a0f0f87488f&_e=xsRTZK4zZh67bF6z5_K4M1jUpP1jzyj7hV4Q5VoFiqCkzDm96vm55rDApJnf5i0txyFG3gCbX-Hv87QmQeUgqmdk4rcus24fRr-4bMD39BK87oZKvh16_vQzB-sIOt-TMM7jKSo_uyprU-kZPfAj9PHtKD05FZDrBUk797lz8D22Hj2zCt-pSBSdmWDQ1GGYvBK4XWDUPt7Ymt9PgWwkdFqwuVn0lpgFb-NilXpJJbsy6u1QhIZS9AgC_-ksyQlAycWr1-lkamMBUPNZcPT7uDE93aDRhxCfVObwMmo4-BtDYQCEIc9xzaJWDZSD9PtN577rX_1sFNTJX_re4uJUmi10BljbNEvdhelhcaJQZcjbQJiie3id3rc5Y6fM4lrV1BFl8pWWUIIKBBHYUTNOGiVTJGEJgSvwnnVX1bvuI14%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d11217c980344e8eacbb3a0f0f87488f&_e=xsRTZK4zZh67bF6z5_K4M1jUpP1jzyj7hV4Q5VoFiqCkzDm96vm55rDApJnf5i0txyFG3gCbX-Hv87QmQeUgqmdk4rcus24fRr-4bMD39BK87oZKvh16_vQzB-sIOt-TMM7jKSo_uyprU-kZPfAj9PHtKD05FZDrBUk797lz8D22Hj2zCt-pSBSdmWDQ1GGYvBK4XWDUPt7Ymt9PgWwkdNXcG5czstGHKf2UjFVLEcaBVL68kR0wgSBEhc3jFQ-L-KHIZLvKoxCbbo59vk_sc-eSKeBQvTPx2B61FRQwoOIppV6UtITZVDt8ivYeHCRjTOX-krtwZL6MOTCFGE02opWYReKnveWZbBNsfTq6eTRBl34vDzSxnnIKrbyPZOB7WZWTcfw6ppSEfeO1fO4hpRLUy-Nd9N6im-9DJos9u_E%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: A runoff request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919391:JWFzxmGNu:m:1:3374012347:532FAB10722C694DCA3DEDAD83886B69:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919391:JWFzxmGNu:m:1:3374012347:532FAB10722C694DCA3DEDAD83886B69:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919392:JWFzxmGNu:m:1:3374012347:532FAB10722C694DCA3DEDAD83886B69:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919391:JWFzxmGNu:m:1:3374012347:532FAB10722C694DCA3DEDAD83886B69:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919392:JWFzxmGNu:m:1:3374012347:532FAB10722C694DCA3DEDAD83886B69:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919391:JWFzxmGNu:m:1:3374012347:532FAB10722C694DCA3DEDAD83886B69:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919391:JWFzxmGNu:m:1:3374012347:532FAB10722C694DCA3DEDAD83886B69:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919391:JWFzxmGNu:m:1:3374012347:532FAB10722C694DCA3DEDAD83886B69:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919391:JWFzxmGNu:m:1:3374012347:532FAB10722C694DCA3DEDAD83886B69:r)

body:

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919429:6aetxmGNI:m:1:3374627611:F3F64DCD031E0E6095AB93D277FF9DCF:r)**

We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $25, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919429:6aetxmGNI:m:1:3374627611:F3F64DCD031E0E6095AB93D277FF9DCF:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in $25 or even $34 to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919429:6aetxmGNI:m:1:3374627611:F3F64DCD031E0E6095AB93D277FF9DCF:r)**

Thank you,

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock (via Democrats.org)
subject: Your contribution to my campaign could make a huge impact in our race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
In a race this close, every single grassroots contribution could make all the difference. | |
---
Rev. Warnock here -- I'm feeling good about our race, and I hope you are, too. Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign. Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State -- and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority. **But right now, we can’t afford to fall short of our fundraising goal.** The GOP has already poured millions into Georgia to try to flip this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. **In a race this close, every single grassroots contribution could make all the difference. Your contribution to my campaign could make a huge impact in our race.** **So please, Derek, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $10 or more now -- split between my campaign and the DNC -- to keep Georgia blue and elect Democrats nationwide?**

clean_body: In a race this close, every single grassroots contribution could make all the difference. | | Rev. Warnock here -- I'm feeling good about our race, and I hope you are, too. Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign. Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State -- and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority. But right now, we can’t afford to fall short of our fundraising goal. The GOP has already poured millions into Georgia to try to flip this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. In a race this close, every single grassroots contribution could make all the difference. Your contribution to my campaign could make a huge impact in our race. So please, Derek, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $10 or more now -- split between my campaign and the DNC -- to keep Georgia blue and elect Democrats nationwide? Thank you for all your support, Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=024100b501b2417b8d0b3eb569d4de11&_e=duoO6k7HbgTgKhp4qHknhdTtxPO1lSXikPbAOsDusIWVnpX0ymdSr-owsMiVYToQ9-TO_Q4jHIkM-zN7Q2XEGkNrMZ-58Yah0BYdHN4uDtlQmwAeGWVJupvxmH0vXUrYKUHb93Fua_TI1VERMmvSMdcIFMMkY8sD3KSxnCRdLU-VTidIFYOUqxi1v0V-Uyw1rhD64AIeUJKOuQ1NaDGqGw%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Welcome to the Miyares Roundup! Our prayers are with the victims and families of last Sunday’s tragedy at the University of Virginia. | | In response to a request by the University of Virginia and their Board of Visitors, Attorney General Jason Miyares has agreed to commence an external review of the events that led to the tragic death of three university students. To read the University’s request, click | | | | | | Virginia expected to receive approximately $60 million “Companies who facilitated the dispensing of opioids contributed to the opioid epidemic that has devastated millions of lives. This significant settlement will help us fight back against the epidemic and provide abatement and rehabilitation resources to suffering Virginians.” –Attorney General Miyares Click to learn more about this major settlement. Community Coffee with the Attorney General – Fighting Hunger This week, Attorney General Miyares hosted a coffeehour in Richmond with individuals fighting food insecurity in all parts of the Commonwealth. AG Miyares gained more insight into how the economy has impacted many charitable organizations’ efforts to serve their communities in a post-pandemic world. This Thanksgiving, let’s take the time to give back to our communities and support those facing hardships. No one should go to bed with an empty stomach. Thank you to everyone working to make a positive difference. | | | | Virginia set to receive over $10 million This settlement is about Google allegedly misleading consumers about their location tracking practices relating to Google Account settings. “It is imperative that companies take customers’ personal data protection seriously and are transparent and direct about the data collected. As Attorney General, I am committed to protecting Virginians’ personal information and holding accountable companies who mislead Virginians and disregard their privacy.” –Attorney General Miyares Click to learn more about this major settlement. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: 25% of the vote is left to count in California’s 22nd District, which could narrow the Republican majority and throw their caucus into chaos. A political science professor in the area was quoted saying she expects the race to be decided by 100, maybe 1000 votes at most. Can you help support a fair count?
body:
House leadership is up for grabs
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6aea6da9-4658-4bab-b0e0-cd11f05a3202/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **WE HAVE A FEW RACES LEFT THAT WE MUST DELIVER** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e307596-69c9-4965-966e-f8b272948d1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Republicans are now expected to have a 5-7 vote edge in the House. Two of those votes, lunatics Andy Biggs & Matt Gaetz, have promised to will NEVER vote for Kevin McCarthy as leader. 31 voted for Biggs over McCartthy in a leadership contest. And Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, who is one of the more normal Republicans, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats if McCarthy doesn't have the votes._** **__This all adds up to something simple: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote.__** **_One of the races still outstanding is California's 22nd Congressional District, a seat long held by Democrats, but taken over in 2020 by Republican David Valadao. Democrat Rudy Salas is currently within 4,000 votes with an entire 25% of the vote left to count. A political science professor in the area was quoted saying she expects the race to be decided by 100, maybe 1000 votes at most._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support the CA-22 count!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T381bc9a8-ad4b-476e-bc36-cb1a0baa0ca1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We must ensure Salas has the funds for staff & lawyers for what might be another week or two, so every vote is counted, we can take this seat and make it less likely there is a Speaker McCarthy, and more likely a power sharing arrangement that ensures the issues we care about don't get buried._** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f874353-d69a-44b0-9145-44ed09ac07d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you to all the members of the Blue Amp Action Community who keep showing they intend to take every seat we can._** **_Cliff_**
---
| | |

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58b5e784-1c2c-4dea-bfc5-09f93bf315a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
